Buy a pint and get your second for a penny. If you need us, we’ll be rummaging through our couches—looking for loose change.
properties.name: Beaver Island Brewing

properties.blurb: All the benefits of home cooked meals without all the dishes and clean up? Sign us up! With breakfast, lunch and dinner why would we leave? We start with homemade Biscuits & gravy for breakfast. Then come lunchtime we get ourselves a Pork Tenderloin. THEN dinner is here before we know it and we go south of the border for their Enchiladas. Served with rice and beans, you will thank us later. Wash it all down with some of Iowa's best brews on tap. You thought we were kidding when we said we weren’t leaving…
properties.name: Beaver Tap

properties.blurb: If there’s one thing Bee’s Knees Brewing Co is going to do, it’s commit to the bit. Order a refreshing draft from their menu: you can choose from Hazy Hive, I’ll Bee Bock, Sweat Bee Stout, Electric Nectar, and more buzz-worthy options (see what we did there?) And if you’re hungry, don’t get a bee in your bonnet.  They also have warm calzones, breadsticks, and French dip sandwiches on the menu.
properties.name: Bee's Knees Brewing Co

properties.address: 416 E Walnut St, Des Moines, IA 50309
properties.blurb: At Beechwood Lounge, the smiles are as refreshing as the beers we pour! Our friendly staff is here to make your visit a memorable one, serving up great vibes and even better brews. Whether you're seeking a hoppy IPA, a smooth stout, or something in between, our wide selection of beers has you covered. The inviting atmosphere sets the stage for laughter, conversations, and unforgettable moments shared with friends old and new. So come on in, grab a seat, and let the good times flow at Beechwood Lounge. Cheers to good company, fantastic brews, and creating memories that will leave you buzzing with joy!
properties.name: Beechwood Lounge

properties.address: 318 C, Mid Rivers Mall Dr, St Peters, MO 63376, USA
properties.blurb: Walking into Beer BBQ Shop is kind of like going to a friend’s backyard cookout. That is if that friend had local craft beer on tap, 600 more in the fridge, and 200 sauces and rubs lined up for you to sample. Actually, now that we’re saying it out loud… this doesn’t sound like your friend’s BBQ at all. Maybe leave it to the professionals and let Beer BBQ Shop handle the good stuff.
properties.name: Beer BBQ Shop

properties.blurb: Whether you're from the area or just Ben Bikin' through (see what we did there?) you'll want to pull into this old service shop that became one of the coolest tap & bottle bars we've come across. Beau knows beer. Trust this dude and his staff to find you a new favorite or two!
properties.name: Beer Shop

properties.address: 1543 San Marco Blvd, Jacksonville, FL 32207, USA
properties.blurb: At Beer:30, it’s always beer o’clock and we don’t care what your watch says. With 15 rotating taps, a fresh wine list, and a full lineup of ciders, seltzers, sodas, and NA options, there’s something for every kind of thirst. Come get lost in the joy of choosing your next pour, trade stories over a perfectly chilled glass, or just let the time slip away entirely. Around here, the only thing more reliable than the drinks is the fact that it’s always the right time for one more.
properties.name: Beer:30

properties.address: 2700 Olive St, St. Louis, MO 63103, USA
properties.blurb: Beffa's Bar is the kind of place that we can't help but adore, and there are plenty of fantastic reasons why. Lets start with an inviting atmosphere that feels like a warm hug, scrumptious snacks and sandwiches that'll tantalize your taste buds, and then the service that's nothing short of outstanding, Beffa's is the go-to spot for relaxation and unwinding. This beloved establishment has been a fixture in the community for decades, and they're still going strong because they genuinely love what they do! So why not swing by, mingle with the friendly regulars, and before you know it, you’ll become one yourself.
properties.name: Beffa's Bar & Restaurant

properties.address: n64w23246 Main St, Sussex, WI 53089, USA
properties.blurb: Step into Belfast Station in Sussex, Wisconsin, and get ready for a trip to the "Conductors Cottage," where the vibe is as cozy as a train conductor's favorite stop after a long day. Or, take a seat at the Belfast Bar and feel like you've been whisked away to a lively Irish pub, complete with 14 TVs to keep you up to date on all the sports action—be it soccer, football, or basketball. And let's not forget the star attractions: their Shepherd's Pie and Irish Meatloaf are comfort food at its finest, making every visit a tasty journey! So, whether you're there for the food, the drinks, or just the good times, Belfast Station is the place to be!
properties.name: Belfast Station Northwoods Irish Pub & Grill

properties.address: 114 N Tejon St #100, Colorado Springs, CO 80903
properties.blurb: Say this one five times fast: the Bell Brothers brew beer. Even if you’re no good at tongue twisters, we bet you’ll enjoy the beer. Thanks to their engineering background, the Bell brothers have figured out all the technical details that go into a perfect pint. Treat your inner nerd to an Ohm’s Law-ger and buy your buddy a LEO Hazy Pale Ale. All pints are $5, so even splitting the check is easy.
properties.name: Bell Brothers Brewing

properties.address: 440 E Grand Ave, Des Moines, IA 50309, USA
properties.blurb: Bell Hop Tiki bar is a tropical oasis right in the heart of the historic east village! If you're craving a splash of sunshine and a burst of good vibes, this is the place to be. Prepare yourself for a high-energy environment where the tiki classics reign supreme, concocted with the freshest juices and homemade syrups. But it doesn't stop there! Their drink menu offers a delightful variety of beers and even a bowl to share with your crew. As you enter, you'll be enchanted by the hand-cut and stained woodwork, and the multicolored bar adorned with tropical foliage wallpaper. Get ready for a taste of paradise, where every sip takes you on a journey to the tropics. Aloha, Bellhop Tiki bar!
properties.name: Bellhop

properties.blurb: Step into Belshire Brewing Co, and you'll find more than just a brewery; it's a place where stories are shared, laughter fills the air, and cold beer flows freely. It's a tribute to the enduring spirit of camaraderie, where generations come together to celebrate, reminisce, and create new memories. They invite you on a nostalgic journey back to the 70s and 80s, reminiscent of those cherished Wisconsin neighborhoods. It's a place where memories are made and where the bonds of friendship that were forged decades ago continue to thrive.
properties.name: Belshire Brewing Company

properties.address: 251 E Main St, Reedsburg, WI 53959, USA
properties.name: Bender's Tap Inn

properties.blurb: Bengal Tap Room has got everything you need for a good time – beer, food, and sports. Mondays are pitcher-perfection day with $5.00 pitchers of domestic beers – cheers to starting the week off right! And when thirsty Thursdays roll around, they have got your back with $3 glasses of house wine – a toast to making it through the week! Oh, and dont forget sports they have got 'em all, all the time. Cheer on your favorite teams while sipping on your favorite brews. But wait, there's more! Their menu is a treasure trove of delectable choices, and don't miss out on their burger of the week – always a mouthwatering surprise. Whether you're into cocktails, martinis, wine, or non-alcoholic drinks, they have got you covered. So why wait? Come on down to Bengal Tap Room for a night filled with chill vibes and good times. See you there!
properties.name: Bengal Tap Room

properties.blurb: The team at Bent never ceases to amaze. They've always struck a fine balance between beer and booze, but now they've made it possible for you to try their fantastic spirits in the taproom as well! So start things off with a Nordic Blonde or two then consider which cocktail you'd like to share with your seatmates. Hungry? There's often a food truck and always popcorn and pizza. One of our favorite 'keep you on your toes' spots just keeps cranking out the good times. If Bartley is in, ask him what crazy concoction he's working on next!
properties.name: Bent Brewstillery

properties.address: 4839 E Colfax Ave, Denver, CO 80220, USA
properties.name: Benzina

properties.blurb: Berkeley Alley Beer Co. packs big flavors into their beers. Offerings run the gamut from Strawberry Rhubarb Sour (basically summer in a glass) to Vanilla in Your Rye, with its hefty punch of barrel-aged goodness. Enjoy your beer on the patio or check the events calendar and mix up your week with everything from board game night to a chili cook-off.
properties.name: Berkeley Alley Beer Co

properties.blurb:
BOGO DEAL GOOD ON BEERS UP TO $10 VALUE

My goodness, some of the cocktails we tried could be considered art in their own right. The Sazerac with rye, peychauds, sugar, and absinthe eased the woes of the world for a bit and the Berkeley Burro made of bourbon, ginger liqueur, lime and soda made us wish every city had a place like this one. Taps on hand showcase some of Colorado and the West’s finest, like the Coffee Lager from Wibby. Occasional live music and a boozy 5k spice up their events calendar, and the sidewalk seating is great for chatting with those ambling by.
properties.name: Berkeley Untapped

properties.blurb: The folks at Berthoud Brewing offer up simple, classic beers in a cozy atmosphere. Their commitment to crafting highly drinkable beers with quality ingredients is why they are one of our favorite small town breweries. If you find yourself at the brewery when a local food truck is visiting, count yourself lucky. You can’t go wrong with a little BBQ & Fireside Scottish pairing.
properties.name: Berthoud Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Berthoud Brewing is our favorite spot for an afternoon beer and pizza after a long day exploring Estes Park. Nothing helps satisfy those post-hike cravings quite like a Lowrider Light, a super crushable and refreshing brew. Pair that with a Colorado Supreme pizza piping hot from the woodfire oven and it’s just *chef’s kiss*! You’ll love the patio, you’ll love the friendly faces, did we mention you’ll love the tap lineup
properties.name: Berthoud Brewing Co

properties.address: 4840 NW Bethany Blvd, Portland, OR 97229, USA
properties.name: Bethany Public House

properties.address: 805 Business Park Rd, Wisconsin Dells, WI 53965, USA
properties.blurb: Discover the Dells' best-kept secret at Bevy, where craft meets community. With a self-pour tap wall featuring an array of in-house beers, ciders, and meads, there's truly something for everyone—whether you're an IPA enthusiast or a cider connoisseur. Every pour is a perfect blend of passion and precision, capturing the essence of tradition in each sip. Family and pet-friendly, Bevy offers a welcoming space to enjoy live music, great drinks, and good company.
properties.name: Bevy Brewery & Winery

properties.blurb: The only thing better than a long day on the green is a long day on the green with an ice-cold craft beer. Beyond Golf Bar + Kitchen combines these indulgences with indoor golf on some of the world’s most famous courses and a 24-tap beer system highlighting local and regional craft beers. The best part? Golf in February just became not only possible — but positively balmy.
properties.name: Beyond Golf Bar + Kitchen

properties.blurb: This is the place where sports fanatics and beer enthusiasts collide in the most epic way! With a jaw-dropping lineup of 30+ TVs and a whopping 25 beers on tap, this Nashville gem has got it going on. Get ready to taste the magic of local, craft, and seasonal beers, alongside your trusty favorite domestics.  Whether you're cheering on your team or just chilling with pals, this sports bar has stepped up its game, and you won't be able to resist the fantastic brews they have in store. Oh, and did we mention they broadcast all major league sporting events? Say goodbye to missing those epic game-winning moments because at Beyond the Edge, you'll be right in the heart of the action.
properties.name: Beyond the Edge

properties.blurb: Having won awards at the Colorado State and New York International Beer Competitions Beyond the Mountain has the hardware to boast a little. Yet you wouldn’t know it by the humble and down to earth staff. A snazzy bar adorned with concert stubs ties in with BMD’s appreciation for music as they often feature on-site shows..Creative brews like the Prima Mexicana Vienna Lager, gave us that contemplative wistfulness you can only get with good beer and a view of the mountains.
properties.name: Beyond the Mountain Brewing Co

properties.address: 1213 Liberty Rd B-4, Sykesville, MD 21784, USA
properties.name: BierBath

properties.blurb: Biere Bar is the ultimate beer lover's paradise, nestled along the scenic Westbank of the Mississippi River in Marrero, New Orleans. And let me tell you, it's the Westbank's hidden gem for all things brew-tastic! Locally owned and operated, Biere Bar boasts the most extensive beer selection on the Westbank, featuring over 200 incredible beers with the seasonal lineup constantly changing. And the best part? Thirty of those beauties are on tap, just waiting to tantalize your taste buds! Just when you thought it couldn’t get better, there is more! Picture this: a colossal projector for epic sporting events, eight massive big-screen TVs, live music to get your groove on, and even video Poker for the daring souls!  Whether you're a sports fanatic, a music lover, or just here for the good times, this place has got you covered!
properties.name: Biere Bar

properties.address: 2707 W Eisenhower Blvd #9, Loveland, CO 80537, USA
properties.blurb: The view here alone will leave you in awe, but their beer? Well, it's equally awe-inspiring! With a whopping 18 beers on tap, you'll have no shortage of options to quench your thirst. Whether you prefer to sip your brew in their cozy taproom or take it to-go with their refillable growlers, the choice is yours. And let's not forget about the beer itself - brewed in the traditional German style, each sip is crafted with the finest ingredients to ensure a truly remarkable taste. So, why settle for anything less when you can experience the awesomeness of Big Beaver Brewing Co?
properties.name: Big Beaver Brewing Co

properties.blurb: This place takes sustainability and quality to a whole new level as one of Iowa's three Platinum-Certified Iowa Green Breweries. It's like they're brewing happiness for the planet and your taste buds at the same time! Now, let's talk about the star of the show—the award-winning Easy Eddy hazy IPA. It's not just any IPA; it's THE best-selling IPA in all of Iowa! And trust me, one sip of this hazy goodness, and you'll know exactly why it's such a hit! The secret to their success lies in the art of hand-selecting the finest hops and grains for each brew. It's like they've got a magic touch when it comes to crafting these liquid masterpieces. And with their seasoned and skilled brewers working their magic, you can bet every pint is a winner!
properties.name: Big Grove Brewpub-Solon

properties.blurb: You know that cool neighbor you wish you had? The one with a huge garage that brews beer and throws parties for all the big games with bags and darts and pinball? If you live in Tosa, Big Head is that neighbor. Luckily you’re welcome to crash this party no matter your address. Grab a Brown or a Hefe or a Smash (or all three!) and settle in.
properties.name: Big Head Brewing

properties.blurb: Are we rule breakers? Not really. But rule benders? Well, let’s just say we’ve been known to flex a little, which is why we vibe so well with Big Rack Brew Haus. Owner and brewer Aaron Oviatt gets it! he’s all about crafting beers that push boundaries, even if that means bending a rule or two. With a passion for both beers and big bucks (the deer kind, of course), it’s no wonder we’ve got a soft spot for the 12 Pointer Porter. Sure, you can find these brews all over Iowa, but trust us, the taproom at the Brew Haus is where the magic happens. It’s the perfect place to feel like you’re one with nature without having to leave the comfort of your barstool.
properties.name: Big Rack Brew Haus

properties.address: 216 E 9th Ave, North Kansas City, MO 64116
properties.blurb: Get ready to experience a cosmic adventure at Big Rip Brewing Co! This vibrant brewery takes its name from an intriguing cosmological concept, where the universe faces a mind-boggling fate. But don't worry, because at Big Rip Brewing Co, it's all about enjoying the present moment with out-of-this-world beers. Indulge in the Anti-Grabber, an enchanting Irish Red Ale that will transport your taste buds to new dimensions of flavor. Or take a sip of the Aisle 12, a bold West Coast IPA that will send your palate on a hoppy journey through the stars. With a stellar lineup of handcrafted brews, Big Rip Brewing Co is the perfect destination for beer enthusiasts seeking cosmic sips and cosmic vibes. Join the intergalactic fun, raise a glass, and embark on a flavor-filled voyage at Big Rip Brewing Co!
properties.name: Big Rip Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Honestly, it’s hard to say what’s better - the food or the names they’ve given the food. Wakey, Wakey, Eggs & Bakey Burger? Love Me Tenders? Ain’t Nothin’ but a Chicken Wing? What in Tarnation Sriracha Crispy Chicken Wrap? Shoot dang y’all…we’re more than halfway in love with this place. And we promise, the food hits just as hard as the names do. And they’ve got a thorough selection of libations to choose from, so the question is…why aren’t you there already?
properties.name: Big Sky Country

properties.blurb: Florida weather can be unpredictable, but Big Storm Brewing has the craft beer forecast dialed in. This week’s outlook: Tropic Pressure Golden Ale with light hibiscus followed by a Palm Bender IPA and a high chance of satisfaction through the weekend. Big Storm also roasts their own coffee and opened a distillery in 2020, so you’re covered no matter the weather.
properties.name: Big Storm Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Florida weather can be unpredictable, but Big Storm Brewing has the craft beer forecast dialed in. This week’s outlook: Tropic Pressure Golden Ale with light hibiscus followed by a Palm Bender IPA and a high chance of satisfaction through the weekend. Big Storm’s Orlando location is connected to the Amway Center, making it a breeze to get from taproom to courtside.
properties.name: Big Storm Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Big Storm's Clearwater taproom is the perfect spot to settle in, with its sprawling patio, 19 TVs, and outdoor bar bringing all the good vibes. Whether you're in the mood for a refreshing brew or something from their cocktail menu featuring Big Storm spirits, there's plenty to choose from. Pair your drink with something off their full menu of shareables, salads, and handhelds — trust us, you’ll find something to love.
properties.name: Big Storm Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Start your session on the lighter side with a Pils or Lager. Then mix it up with a Shandy or Gose. You’re in a nice little rhythm now. Might be time to venture into hoppier waters with a Palm Bender or even a Triple IPA. Oh, and the Belgian Series is fantastic as well. Welcome to Big Storm Pasco!
properties.name: Big Storm Brewing Co (Odessa)

properties.blurb: Amidst the brewing storm, Big Storm emerges as a beacon of flavor and excitement. Feel the stress melt away as you savor every drop, surrounded by an atmosphere of pure relaxation. Big Storm's commitment to delivering a dynamic range of beverages is unwavering. Through their dedication to quality, innovative flavors, and the spirit of craft, they present iconic Florida favorites like the Tropic Pressure Golden Ale and the zesty Bromosa Tangerine IPA. Their diverse food menu promises culinary delights that match the excellence of their brews. From the delectable Nashville chicken sandwich to the custom-crafted burgers and the ever-popular mahi tacos, every dish is a taste of satisfaction. So, brace yourself for a storm of flavors and join Big Storm on a journey that celebrates the art of brewing and the joy of sharing it with fellow enthusiasts.
properties.name: Big Storm Brewing Co (Tampa)

properties.blurb: Come to Big Storm’s Pinellas taproom hungry. Why? Because you can pair standout beers like their Tropic Pressure Florida Ale or Southern Ale with some brag-worthy menu items. The Kung Pao wings were perfect with a Pilsner and the IPA-steamed mussels are everything cooking with beer should be. Ask about their special for returning PubPassers!
properties.name: Big Storm Brewing--Pinellas

properties.blurb: "When co-owner Tom asked his 2-year-old daughter what she thought of the name “Trout Brewery,” she wasn’t having it. “No daddy, BIG Trout Brewery,” she corrected, settling the matter once and for all. This local brewpub does, in fact, have trout on its menu. It also has a wide selection of craft beers, tasty bites, and a state-of-the-art brewhouse that reduces water waste and increases extraction rate to help the environment.  "
properties.name: Big Trout Brewing

properties.blurb: Big Wood has all the charm of a northern Minnesotan cabin bar without the long haul to get there. The folks running this cozy joint do things their way. Deviating from the norm is their norm. They’re not interested in brewing what’s trendy—they brew what they like to drink. Good thing they’ve got good taste. Knock back a Cabin Daze Hazy IPA and escape to God’s country right from the comforts of your barstool.
properties.name: Big Wood Brewery

properties.blurb: What’s your go-to order at a BBQ joint and why is burnt ends? There are plenty of other things to admire on the Big’s BBQ & Brew Pub menu, but for realsies, you had me at burnt ends. It’s not like there won’t be an order of pulled pork sammies or smoked mac and cheese “for the table” because there definitely will be. And of course those burnt ends are getting washed down with an ice cold brewski, fresh from the tap.
properties.name: Big's BBQ and Brew Pub

properties.blurb: First things first, their smoked BBQ platter is an absolute must-try. The aroma alone will make your taste buds dance with joy! And speaking of dancing, wait until you sink your teeth into their homemade pizzas! It's like a flavor fiesta in every bite! But wait, there's more. Their crab cakes are out-of-this-world good—so good that even the crabs themselves would approve! And here's the best part: they've got an incredible selection of beers on tap. Once you find your new favorite brew you can even take it home in their awesome Growlers! So whether you're lounging indoors, basking in the sun outdoors, or grabbing some scrumptious bites to-go, Bilda's Friess Lake Pub has got you covered with fantastic food and a fantastic time!
properties.name: Bilda's Friess Lake Pub

properties.blurb: A former gas station turned bar, Billy’s is approaching it’s hundredth birthday. So there’s a certain charm impossible to buy that comes with a place of that age. From the heavy wood bar and counter, to the perfect margarita and fellow cocktail standout the Jalapeñorita, to the ten plus taps and lively outdoor patio, Billy’s has earned its reputation with locals. Oh, and some of the best damn Mexican food in Denver.
properties.name: Billy's Inn

properties.blurb: The original Billy’s Inn opened in 1933 in Denver’s Berkeley neighborhood. And this year, they opened a brand-new location in Congress Park. There’s a reason the original inn has lasted this long: Billy’s has one of Denver’s most extensive tequila and mezcal lists, along with award-winning margaritas and mojitos. Oh, and they also boast some of the best burgers in Denver. In case tequila and margarita somehow wasn’t enough for you.
properties.name: Billy's Inn (Congress Park)

properties.address: 12345 SW Broadway St, Beaverton, OR 97005, USA
properties.name: BinaryBrewing.co

properties.address: 1310 Wayzata Blvd, Long Lake, MN 55356, USA
properties.blurb: You’ll find the cozy vibes of a Wisconsin-Style supperclub and the hop-tastic excitement of an experimental American brewery collide at Birch’s on the Lake! Get ready to feast your eyes on the stunning waterfront view of Long Lake while you dive headfirst into a culinary adventure that will tickle your taste buds. Birch's on the Lake proudly sources local ingredients, making each dish a flavorful masterpiece that celebrates the changing seasons. So grab a seat, raise your glass, and let the good times roll as you savor the delicious fusion of comfort and innovation at Birch's on the Lake.
properties.name: Birch's on the Lake

properties.address: 100 NE 1st Ave Third Floor, Miami, FL 33132, USA
properties.blurb: Biscayne Bay Brewing Co is the official craft beer of the Miami Marlins so yes, you can sip like a champ while cheering on your team at LoanDepot Park. But even if you’re not at the ballgame, the historic Old Post Office building is the perfect spot to enjoy Biscayne Bay’s bold, local brews. Hit a home run with a pint, soak in the crafted space, and drink like every day’s game day.
properties.name: Biscayne Bay Brewing Co

properties.blurb: We love finding small town gems, and BIT Brewery is just one more to add to our must-stop list. If we’ve said it once, we’ve said it a thousand times - no better pairing than pizza and beer. We might add in friendly bartenders and a welcoming environment, but those are just spicy toppings on top of the mouthwatering taco pizza in this metaphor. This brewery in Central City has a solid lineup of tap beers, with interesting flavor combos, which is obviously a running theme since their pizza lineup is just as solid and equally as interesting.
properties.name: BIT Brewery

properties.blurb: When the babysitter bails and you’re craving an adult beverage, come to BJ’s Restaurant and Brewhouse. Chicken tendies for your kid, check. Gooey, hot deep-dish pizza for you, check. Oasis Amber to calm your nerves, check. Single and ready to mingle? Stop by happy hour for $6 apps and discounted pints from a brewery with over 200 awards. You can stay as long as you’d like, but we aren’t babysitters either. Sorry, bud.
properties.name: BJ's Restaurant and Brewhouse

properties.blurb: Beer has become so omnipresent in our consumer culture, it’s easy to forget that brewing the stuff was originally a holy endeavor, carried out by secluded monks centuries before it was hip to make craft brews. Thankfully, no grueling pilgrimage to a mountaintop monastery is required to enjoy the divine qualities of Black Abbey’s many fine products—simply belly up at a farmhouse table in the Fellowship Hall and treat your palate to a variety of excellent European-influenced ales. The Rose Belgian Blonde is their best seller for a reason—boasting the complexity of Belgian yeast and hints of banana and clove, it’s also quite light, clean and eminently sessionable, perfect for a Smashville summer afternoon. The Special Belgian-Style Abbey Ale is deeper in color and flavor profile, with notes of orange and chocolate to delight the nose and taste buds. There’s also a wide variety of non-Belgian type suds, including IPAs, Porters, and all manner of German-style brews. We see a flight (or two) in your future.
properties.name: Black Abbey Brewing Co

properties.address: 423 N Cleveland Ave, Loveland, CO 80537, USA
properties.blurb: Guitar and beer enthusiasts have discovered their ultimate destination at Black and Blues Music and Blues. This unique establishment offers a wide array of guitars, amps, and homebrew supplies for sale, satisfying the needs of both musicians and craft beer enthusiasts alike. The cozy listening room provides a relaxed setting where patrons can enjoy handcrafted cocktails and an impressive selection of craft beers while immersing themselves in the captivating sounds of live music. With a lineup of talented artists performing every Friday through Sunday, Black and Blues showcases a diverse range of local, regional, and international acts spanning various genres. Prepare to be mesmerized by the harmonious fusion of guitar expertise and exceptional brews at Black and Blues Music and Blues.
properties.name: Black and Blues Music and Brews

properties.address: 9315 Snowden River Pkwy, Columbia, MD 21046, USA
properties.blurb: At Black Flag Brewing, the fun never stops! Whether you're into crafty nights, trivia, or even joining a run club, there's always something exciting on the calendar. Their expansive beer list is a dream come true for enthusiasts who want to explore a variety of flavors. And if your tummy start rumbling while you’re sampling all those brews, don’t worry—there’s always a top-notch food truck parked outside ready to satisfy your cravings.
properties.name: Black Flag Brewing Company

properties.blurb: Black Flamingo captures the vibrancy of South Florida in its unique lineup of craft beers. We love a sour that packs a punch and our fave to sip in that endless sunshine is Flamango. (We also love a play on words, obviously.) There’s something for everyone, including a hoppy pale ale and a layered dark lager. This Oakland Park spot offers live music and cold beer and there is honestly nothing we love more than jamming with friends while sipping a cold one.
properties.name: Black Flamingo Brewing (Oakland Park)

properties.blurb: Get ready for another ride on the Black Flamingo! This place is easily becoming one of our local go-tos. Their beer is phenomenal, plus they host all sorts of rad events like Whorny Bingo, Ales & Asana, Disney Villain Trivia, and more. Swing by on the last Saturday of every month for a double dose of yoga and craft beer. Do like we did and order a Hazy Boy IPA and harness your chi.
properties.name: Black Flamingo Brewing (Pompano Beach)

properties.blurb: You don’t need security clearance to enter Black Project, but you will need the codeword if you want the top secrets on their brewing. Catering to palates weary of the routine, Black Projects offers 8 sour/spontaneous beers, 2-3 wild ales, and for the less adventurous 10 guest taps from highly regarded breweries.The Sandworm, a sour with orange and Madagascar vanilla bean smashed preconceptions on what sours typically taste like. A spacious interior and a shiny plane wing for a bar, Black Project is ideal for both the Joe Publics and the Jason Bournes.
properties.name: Black Project Spontaneous & Wild Ales

properties.blurb: Black Rose Blending Co. is more than just a fermentation project—it's a canvas for liquid art. Unbound by style guidelines or conventions, each creation is a one-of-a-kind expression of creativity, crafted with unique barrels, ingredients, and ideas. With no flagships or seasonals, every release is a singular experience, not often to be replicated. Here, the freedom to experiment reigns, resulting in ferments that are as thoughtful as they are unexpected.
properties.name: Black Rose Blending Co

properties.blurb: Get ready for a flavor explosion at Black Shirt Brewing Co! This Denver-based brewery has a reputation for crafting some of the most unique beers around, and they're also home to some seriously delicious food. Whether you're craving a slice of their signature pizza, beer battered cauliflower, or oven-baked wings, they've got you covered. But let's talk about the beer - Black Shirt's flagship beer, Colorado Public Red, is a must-try. This hopped red ale is bursting with flavor, and it's a perfect complement to any of their mouth-watering menu items. Come for the beer, stay for the food - Black Shirt Brewing Co is a must-visit for any craft beer lover looking to expand their palate.
properties.name: Black Shirt Brewing

properties.blurb: Black Sky Brewery is a self-proclaimed experimental brewery. Which makes sense from a place that has a self-proclaimed executioner and minister of frothy libations. Black Sky is all about beer, pizza, and metal. And they shred at all three.
properties.name: Black Sky Brewery

properties.address: 3448 Marinatown Ln STE C, North Fort Myers, FL 33903, USA
properties.name: Blackbeards Tavern

properties.blurb: We like a place with a little bit of everything, which is another way of saying: we like Blackbird Public House. Order fresh-shucked oysters and a Cranberry Manhattan if you’re feeling fancy, or opt for a local beer and BBQ Chicken pizza if today’s been a long one. Whatever you’re craving, Blackbird has options, plus daily specials to top it all off.
properties.name: Blackbird Public House

properties.blurb: Blackened Brew is our go-to spot in Hammond. 24 craft beer taps. 90-some-odd beers in bottles and cans. Live entertainment every weekend. And don’t even get us started on their whisky selection. Feelin’ hungry? You’ve come to the right place. It’s tough to top Blackened Brew’s Korean BBQ Burger complemented with a side of jalapeño cheese curds and a local IPA. Better yet, it all pairs well with a big win by The Black and Gold. Who dat say dey gonna beat dem Saints?
properties.name: Blackened Brew

properties.address: 3104 N Nevada Ave Ste A, Colorado Springs, CO 80907, USA
properties.name: Blackhat Distillery

properties.address: 2312 Clifton Ave Suite B, Nashville, TN 37209
properties.blurb: Step right into the vibrant world of Blackstone Brewing Co., where the magic of craft beer comes to life. As Nashville's oldest and most celebrated brewery, they offer an impressive lineup of award-winning beers that make taste buds sing with delight. With 16 taps pouring liquid perfection, each sip is an adventure in itself. And when it comes to satisfying cravings, their Food Bus delivers mouthwatering burgers, fries, and daily specials that keep patrons coming back for more. Guests can indulge in a beer-filled extravaganza that combines great brews, incredible food, and a whole lot of fun. At Blackstone Brewing Co., the good times flow and the flavors soar.
properties.name: Blackstone Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Rumor has it that after one visit to Blake’s Taphouse, you’ll be humming the “Cheers” theme song all the way home. We can sure see why. Blake’s has the kind of atmosphere that’d make anyone into a regular. With a huge selection of craft beers on tap, a mouthwatering menu of bar food, and frequent live music events, it’s the perfect spot for happy hour, family dinner, or date night.
properties.name: Blake's Taphouse

properties.address: 234 N College Ave a3, Fort Collins, CO 80524, USA
properties.name: Blanchard Family Wines - Fort Collins

properties.address: 94 Washington Dr Unit B, Centerport, NY 11721, USA
properties.name: Blind Bat Brewery Bistro

properties.blurb: “Blind Butcher” isn’t just a name. Co-owner Rob Hage started the craft brewery after he was declared legally blind and became a patient at the University of Iowa Institute for Vision Research (IVR). He then partnered with IVR with the joint mission of raising awareness and funds for a preventative treatment for many causes of blindness. Including his own. That's a pretty great reason to buy another beer.
properties.name: Blind Butcher Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Bloomer Brewing Co. boasts a combined 40+ years of brewing experience, a spacious tap room, and homemade craft root beer for the underage (or abstaining). It also has craft cocktails like the appropriately-named Uff-Da, and beers with delightful names like Barrel Aged Hog Breath (it has hints of maple syrup and bacon) and Fa-La-La Lager (it has a touch of dark chocolate and peppermint!) Wisconsin should be proud.
properties.name: Bloomer Brewing Co

properties.address: 2710 Locust St, St. Louis, MO 63103, USA
properties.blurb: Blue Jay Brewing is a place so good you'll be singing its praises—just like a Blue Jay after a pint or two. But it gets even better. They're partnering with Farm Spirit to bring you farm-fresh food in the taproom Wednesday through Sunday! So, whether you're a fan of fresh brews or fresh bites, they’ve got both covered. Trust us, after your first sip, you won’t just chirp about it—you’ll shout it from the rooftops!
properties.name: Blue Jay Brewing Co

properties.blurb: One of the big kids on the block going back to 1995, Blue Moon has been backing up its rep with that seminal flagship Belgian White, but at their gorgeous and spacious RiNo location you can also sample an Orange Blossom Kölsch, the boomy 8.2% ABV Hop Dumpster IPA, and the dreamy Mexican Chocolate Brown Ale. The menu is just as stout as their beer offerings, with nachos, bison burgers, and a chicken bahn mi among the selections.
properties.name: Blue Moon Brewing Company RiNo

properties.blurb: Astronomically speaking, a blue moon occurs only once in a while. Blue Moon Pizza, on the other hand, is open seven days a week. That means seven days of delicious pizza and cold beers. Think that’s a pie-in-the-sky idea? Not after you try their specialty pizza the Meateor, with cayenne-candied bacon. If seven visits in a row feels overkill, grab a take-and-bake pizza to enjoy at home. Your secret’s safe with us.
properties.name: Blue Moon Pizza

properties.address: 2400 E Cesar Chavez St #300, Austin, TX 78702, USA
properties.blurb: Sour beer fans, you’ve found your happy place. Blue Owl’s house-soured creations pack plenty of pucker, but they don’t stop there. Bob’s Fine Beers offers a safety net for those craving something more familiar. Think crisp pilsners, smooth porters, and juicy IPAs. With a laid-back vibe and a lineup that caters to both the adventurous and the traditional, this East Austin gem brings a little something for every kind of beer lover.
properties.name: Blue Owl Brewing

properties.address: 4151 E County Line Rd G, Centennial, CO 80122
properties.blurb: This locally owned brewpub is like a wonderland of craft beers and good times! First things first, let's talk about their brews. They've got their own custom craft beers that are like little drops of liquid gold. And as if that's not enough, they've also got a lineup of Colorado's finest brews from other awesome breweries. Talk about a beertastic paradise! Now, let's move on to the food, shall we? Prepare your taste buds for an epic adventure! Blue Spruce is not messing around when it comes to satisfying your hunger. They've got burgers that are so juicy you'll need a bib, sandwiches that are stacked to the sky, and street tacos that will make your taste buds salsa dance! Oh, and don't even get me started on their fish n' chips... it's like a seaside vacation on a plate!
properties.name: Blue Spruce Brewing Co (Centennial)

properties.blurb: If you're looking for a unique brewery experience that's got it all - great beer, delicious food from their own custom kitchen, and plenty of games and entertainment - head on over to Blue Spruce Brewing Co. You won't be disappointed. With 40 taps at their bar, you'll have plenty of options to choose from. If you're looking for something light and refreshing, their Oar Loko Mexican Lager is the perfect choice. It's a light-bodied, clean lager that's easy to drink and perfect for any occasion. For those who like something with a little more complexity, the Kwana Porter is a smooth, sweet brew with a roasty chocolate malt profile. Blue Spruce Brewing Co isn't just about the beer - they've also got a game room with dart lanes, pool tables, pinball, video games, foosball, and 6 TVs. It's the perfect spot to hang out with friends and enjoy some great beer and good times.
properties.name: Blue Spruce Brewing Co (Littleton)

properties.blurb: The crackling of a fire, the comforting atmosphere of a well-crafted recycled wood interior, an endless supply of wines, beers, and dazzling cocktails, and food that is bound to have you coming back again and again. Have we just described nirvana itself? Perhaps. We were certainly close to that after sampling their Saloon Ramen (bless the crispy pork belly gods) alongside a glass of Riesling. No matter what you order it’s sure to soothe any slope or trail soreness. Or you know, a particularly rough Wednesday.
properties.name: Blue Stag Saloon

properties.address: 1609 E 58th Ave unit g, Denver, CO 80216
properties.blurb: This relative newcomer suddenly seems like a sudsy vet that’s been cranking out impossibly tasty craft beer for years on end. The newish kids on the block at Blue Tile Brewing live to tantalize your taste buds. Exhibit A: Young J.B., a Jungle Bird-inspired sour brimming with lime purée, orange and grapefruit peels, blackstrap molasses, and a Campari-esque spice blend. #beerme
properties.name: Blue Tile Brewing

properties.blurb: This St. Louis landmark hardly needs an introduction, but in case you’re new in town, make sure to visit Blueberry Hill. Chuck Berry played over 200 shows there, putting them on the map as a live music destination. Before the show starts, browse the gigantic collection of pop culture memorabilia while sipping a beer from their impressive tap list. Pair with toasted ravioli for the perfect St. Louis experience.
properties.name: Blueberry Hill

properties.address: 300 Tingey St SE #180, Washington, DC 20003, USA
properties.blurb: A showpiece of Navy Yard’s craft scene, Bluejacket delivers small-batch beers with big character. Their rotating lineup spans crisp lagers, bold hop-forward brews, British-style ales, barrel-aged experiments, and inventive fruited sours. All brewed onsite of course with meticulous care. The spacious, industrial-chic taproom offers front-row views of the brewing action, while a thoughtful food menu highlights local, seasonal ingredients and pairs effortlessly with what’s in your glass. It’s a place for curious drinkers, beer lovers, and anyone who appreciates flavor without boundaries.
properties.name: Bluejacket Brewery and Restaurant

properties.address: 16211 Main Ave SE, Prior Lake, MN 55372
properties.blurb: Prior Lake’s first taproom is quite the cause for celebration. Whether it’s enjoying a Candy Cove Kolsch out on the water, a Cobertizzo Mexican Lager by the beach, an Oatmeal Chocolate Chip Stout by the campfire, or a General Quarters IPA out on the ice, Boathouse Brothers Brewing’s beers are made to cheers lake life.
properties.name: Boathouse Brothers Brewing

properties.blurb: With arguably the best cheese curds this side of the St. Croix, Bobtown is a staple in the local community. With a nice selection of brews on tap and a mouthwatering food menu, including some seriously juicy burgers, it’s no surprise this little watering hole is where the locals hang. The rotating selection offers a little something for everyone, and if you’re like us, and want to try everything on the menu, grab a flight. Bobtown gives off our favorite kind of dive bar vibes, and we’re here for it.
properties.name: Bobtown Brewery

properties.address: 1501 Lee Hill Dr UNIT 14, Boulder, CO 80304
properties.blurb: "If you’re looking for a cider that is unfiltered, unpasteurized, and gluten-free, let us introduce you to BOCO Cidery and Taproom. It offers 12 refreshing house-made Boulder ciders on tap, and has live music, comedy, and community events nearly every night of the week. And if you’re gazing guiltily into your little furball’s pleading eyes right now trying to decide whether to leave them home alone, don’t worry: BOCO is totally dog-friendly. "
properties.name: BOCO Cider

properties.blurb: Bodihow Brewing Co is a biker’s dream come true, serving up fresh Mesoamerican flavors alongside craft beers that hit the spot. In the same space is Oregon Bicycle Company, a full-service bike shop ready to keep your wheels rolling with everything from tune-ups to gear upgrades. If your idea of biking is cruising from brewery to brewery, this place is made for you. And if you’d rather drive? No worries. Just come hungry, thirsty, and ready to enjoy.
properties.name: Bodihow Brewing Co

properties.address: 15425 Old Town Dr Suite 118, Parkville, MO 64152
properties.blurb: With Boho Brewing specializing in Bohemian and German Lagers we knew we had to try the Boho Czech Style Lager followed by the Boho Creekside Cream Ale and might we say, they were both fantastic. We were impressed by the fun vibe and lighting inside and a stellar patio outside. You’ll find us challenging everyone to a game of corn hole while we drink our way down their incredible tap list.
properties.name: Boho Brewing

properties.address: 1971 India St, San Diego, CA 92101, USA
properties.name: Bolt Brewery

properties.address: 14825 E Shea Blvd #101, Fountain Hills, AZ 85268
properties.blurb: Have you ever been served your beer flight in a coffin? No? If you’re down for something whimsical and macabre, lean into the unique vibe at Bone Haus. This brewery prides itself on its creative and inspired brews. There’s nothing cooler than an outrageous origin story and beer that lives up to the hype. Bone Haus offers a steady rotation of limited editions and seasonals, as well some signature beers. Try them all, trust us. They are well worth it.
properties.name: Bone Haus Brewing

properties.blurb: "If you’re from Southwest Florida and don’t like Bone Hook Brewing, you’re out of luck: the closest similar brewpub is 242 miles away! Thankfully, Bone Hook has it all, with the largest selection of freshly made beer in the state. They always have at least 20 selections on tap, and are both a family-run business and the largest brewpub in Southwest Florida.  "
properties.name: Bone Hook Brewing Co

properties.blurb: When it comes to margaritas, they've got the magic touch that will leave you wanting more, more, and yes, you guessed it, more !Let's talk about their margs, shall we? From the classic Bonez Margarita that's pure tequila magic with a twist of tangy goodness, to the Scorpion that'll give your taste buds a spicy surprise! Oh, and the Watermelon Marg... oh, yes, it's like a refreshing slice of paradise in a glass!  Now, let's move on to the food, because trust me, you're gonna want to eat your way through this menu! Whether it's the mouthwatering enchiladas that'll make your heart sing, the flavor-packed bowls that are an explosion of yum, or the tacos that'll take you straight to taco heaven, Bonez Tequila Bar and Grill has got you covered.
properties.name: Bonez Tequila Bar and Grill

properties.address: 777 N Arizona Ave UNIT 3, Chandler, AZ 85225, USA
properties.name: Bonnie's Bread & Butter Co.

properties.blurb: Calling all nerds. It’s time to geek out and game on at Bonus Round. The board games, pinball, and arcade are always free. What’s more, they have a huge selection of bottles and drafts, plus a curated list of craft cocktails. Nothing beats a few games of NBA Jam with plenty of cold beer to go around. We got next.
properties.name: Bonus Round

properties.blurb: Check out a pint and settle in because there’s a story on every plate at this new neighborhood gem. Whether you start at the beginning with highlighter-worthy brunchables like their 3-Day Porchetta Benny and Vanilla Custard French Toast or skip ahead to a fried chicken sando worthy of its own character arc, your inner bookworm and tapeworm will dance. Together. But not too close. Just sort of awkwardly with elbows locked like middle schoolers. But cool middle schoolers.
properties.name: Book Club

properties.blurb: Boone needs no introduction. But we're gonna rep them anyway. Fantastic cocktails. Genuine staff. Approachable surroundings. Attention to detail without pretense. Whether across town or across the country? This bar is one we always measure others against. Stop by, have one of their legendary old fashioneds, and you'll get the idea in a hurry...
properties.name: Boone & Crockett

properties.blurb: What can we say about this place that hasn’t been said? They outgrew their original home. They make cocktails so tasty we’d consider giving up beer. But then they run it back with a beer list so thoughtful you could almost forget to order a cocktail. Which would be a mistake here. Because we’re pretty sure their barrel-aged Old Fashioned is secreted from the tree of life itself. Meet the new Boone. Same as the old Boone. And we couldn’t be happier.
properties.name: Boone and Crocket

properties.blurb: Maybe the best cocktail bar we've come across anywhere. Lucky for you? It's in Cream City. Meet your liver's spirit animal. Purveyors of the best damn Old Fashioned you'll swill all year. The décor in this joint—a blend of vintage, swanky, and taxidermy—is enough to get you to happily order something called “I think this one works.” It’s that kind of bravado that leads to ingenuity. And while it might not be fusion power, you’ll be praising these liquid inventions as if they were. Hungry? Taco Moto has you covered, baby.
properties.name: Boone and Crockett

properties.address: 2545 Progress St STE D, Vista, CA 92081, USA
properties.name: Booze Brothers Brewing Co.

properties.address: 444 S Park St, Madison, WI 53715, USA
properties.blurb: The Borough is the neighborhood hangout we all wish was right around the corner. This cozy spot is perfect for grabbing a booth or settling in at the bar to savor comfort food with a homemade twist. Enjoy a freshly tapped beer or explore their rotating guest brews while watching the game on the big screens. With specialty cocktails and inventive Old Fashioneds, there’s something for everyone. Especially during Happy Hour with cocktails at half off. Weekends are a blast with Friday Fish Fry, brunch, and those legendary Bloody Marys.
properties.name: Borough Beer Co

properties.blurb: We love a good neighborhood joint. The warmth, the homeyness, and the welcoming nature just seeps out of Borough Beer Co. Grab a local pint and a spot on the patio, or something a little less local and a table inside to listen to some live music. With a brunch, lunch and dinner food menu you could honestly hang out here all day. We can never pass on a Nashville Hot Chicken Club, topped with their spicy oil, cheese, AND bacon we were in heaven. Washed down with Roly Soli Hazy IPA brewed locally. Our day couldn’t have gotten any better.
properties.name: Borough Beer Co & Kitchen

properties.blurb: Years ago, it was building number 42 on the Pabst Brewing Company campus. Today, it’s a brewery and restaurant with a stunning rooftop patio that’ll give you an aura of chic and sophistication and other things we humans yearn for. Thing like house made ranch. Curds. Smash burgers. Maybe the best of the items we noshed? The Funky Chicken — a masterful spin on a fried chix sando that somehow flawlessly works in pomento cheese spread. Can we get another beer?
properties.name: Bottle House 42

properties.blurb: Get ready for a beer run like you've never known. Bottleshop 48 isn't your average liquor store. Sure, they've got an impossibly awesome inventory of local craft, including hard-to-find beers that you'll be hard-pressed to find elsewhere. And, yeah, they've even got a nice selection of wine. But it's their 12 rotating taps, featuring Arizona breweries and national craft juggernauts, that really raises the bar. *ba dum tss* Let's put it this way: we're big fans of enjoying a pint of barley pop while shopping for, well, barley pop.
properties.name: Bottle Shop 48

properties.blurb: This place “nose” a thing or two about good beer (sorry, we’ll see ourselves out). With dozens of house brews pouring at any given time, there’s something here for every taste. From the classics you know and love to a few creations that might just surprise you. And while the beer is the star, the food menu more than holds its own, serving up the kind of eats that make you wonder if you came for the pint or the plate. Either way, you’re in the right spot.
properties.name: Bottlenose Brewing

properties.blurb: At Bottles and Taps, it's a haven where great people come together for great beer and even greater times! With an impressive selection of brews on tap, in bottles, and cans, you're in for a treat every time you step through those doors.But hold on tight because the real magic happens when you dive into their mouthwatering menu! Beer Cheese Nachos, Spicy Mac & Cheese Bites, Egg Rolls, and Bavarian Pretzel sticks dripping with beer cheese—your taste buds will be in absolute bliss! Trust us, anything you order here will bring you joy and leave you craving for more.
properties.name: Bottles and Taps

properties.blurb: Bottleshop 48 carries everything you didn’t know you wanted. But we have faith in you, loyal PubPassers, to make smart choices when it comes to sampling and sipping beer. The bartenders are crazy smart and have seen many of you walk in with deer-in-the-headlights energy. If too many options overwhelm you, well, we can’t help you with that other than to encourage you to just lean in and try ‘em all. Not at once, obviously. But grab a pint to sip while you shop. It’s a genius business model.
properties.name: Bottleshop 48

properties.blurb: Boulder Social takes the “social” in its name seriously. It’s the kind of place built for gathering, sharing, and staying awhile. With a 10-barrel brew house, a lineup of drinks that go well beyond just beer, and a menu stacked with shareable apps, pizzas, burgers, and entrées, there’s something for every craving. Add in a dog-friendly covered patio and a calendar full of reasons to stop by. From seasonal tappings to watch parties. You’ve got the perfect excuse to be social any day of the week.
properties.name: Boulder Social

properties.blurb: Boulder Social might be the new kid on the block, but they’re already churning out hits. They’re serving up a happy hour menu that rivals the best out there, and we pride ourselves on being happy hour experts. Enjoy a lineup of tap beers that’s a combo of greatest hits and up-and-comers. You’ll love the highly drinkable Social Pils and the juicy Social Hazy IPA - both pair well with the mouthwatering spicy grilled cheese.
properties.name: Boulder Social Brewing

properties.blurb:
Arguably KC’s most iconic craft brewery, Boulevard Brewing Company has been around since 1989, combining old and new brewing techniques to craft the perfect pours. In 2016 they opened their Tours & Rec Center next door, which boasts a sprawling Beer Hall, Test Bar with the latest and greatest straight from the brewery, and gift shop featuring beer swag and exclusive releases.

**Deal good for any Boulevard Beverage excluding Brewhouse One releases**
properties.name: Boulevard Beer Hall

properties.address: 11 W Boston St Suite 1, Chandler, AZ 85225, USA
properties.blurb: This place is perfect if you love living life loud and embracing the country rock spirit. From live music to dancing and parties, it's all about having a good ol' time here. The food is hearty and full of flavor, and they serve up a killer selection of Bourbons, whiskeys, local craft beer, and signature drinks. You won't be disappointed, trust us! The staff is a rowdy and welcoming bunch, making sure you feel right at home. And the vibe? Well, it's all about being a proud American badass! The history is fascinating too, as the tavern is housed in the historic Arrow Pharmacy and Reliable Hardware building, which dates back to 1918.
properties.name: Bourbon Jacks American Tavern

properties.blurb: When we say “size doesn’t matter” we mean it at Bowigens Beer Co. While the space is cozy, their beer selection is nothing short of remarkable, featuring a wide range of options from IPA's to sours, lagers to ales—they've got it all. Once you step inside, get ready to be swept away by the vibrant vibe and infectious energy, creating an all-around fantastic experience as you indulge in their diverse brews. The friendly and welcoming staff ensures your visit will be absolutely unforgettable. So why limit yourself to just one, or two, or three? (Hey, they don’t judge) Embrace the variety and savor a few of their fantastic beers—it's all about enjoying the best of what they have to offer, which, trust us, is an array of incredible brews!
properties.name: Bowigens Beer Co

properties.address: 15353 E Hinsdale Cir STE C, Centennial, CO 80112, USA
properties.blurb: This isn’t just whiskey. It’s Colorado in a bottle. Branch & Barrel Distilling builds their award-winning bourbon on Colorado prairie corn from a dairy co-op in Wiggins, with a little barley for richness and water pulled straight from the Arapahoe Aquifer via wells on the owner's property. The result? Smooth, sweet, and proudly local. 17 awards and counting. Call it corny if you want, but every sip tastes like Colorado done right.
properties.name: Branch & Barrel Distilling

properties.address: 132 S Main St, Lime Ridge, WI 53942
properties.blurb: Step into the warm embrace of farm-to-fork goodness at Branding Iron Roadhouse Farm-to-Fork Eatery. This unique country roadhouse has been delighting taste buds with mouthwatering food made from locally-grown Fearing Angus Beef and other top-notch local products. Your Friday nights just got better with the traditional Wisconsin Friday Night Fish Fry, served straight from the fryer to your plate. And when it comes to burgers, just let them know your preference—whether rare or well-done, they've got you covered! But it's not just the food that shines here. Wisconsin and Regional Micro-brews grace the taps, with a tempting selection of Wisconsin brewed beers available by the bottle. Go ahead, explore their beer list, and you'll surely discover something that tickles your taste buds!
properties.name: Branding Iron Roadhouse Farm-to-Fork Eatery

properties.address: 318 E Colorado Ave, Colorado Springs, CO 80903
properties.blurb: Sip a Blood Orange Creamsicle slush while giving back to veterans at Brass Brewing Co. It’s a veteran and former law enforcement-owned brewery in the heart of downtown Colorado Springs, where every pint or Crowler you buy gives 1 percent back to veterans. Everything is brewed in-house on a 7-barrel system, and, if all that isn’t enough, we have three words for you: Music Video Bingo.
properties.name: Brass Brewing Co

properties.blurb: One of the best craft beer bars around awaits you in nearby Greenfield. With 80 taps, you’ll want to make plans to stay a while and work your way around the list. Don’t worry, they’ll keep you nourished and entertained as well, with a great menu, plenty of TVs and live music.
properties.name: Brass Tap

properties.address: 1205 W Mt Royal Ave, Baltimore, MD 21217
properties.blurb: We’ve got two words for you: Taco. Tuesday. Probably the two best words ever strung together in this modern age if we’re being honest. Except maybe Jazz Brunch. Or Whiskey Wednesday. Of course, then there’s tap list…shoot, what was the question again? Oh, that’s right – when are you going to be here? The folks here at Brass Tap knew exactly what they were doing to make the people happy. Did we mention they’re serving up donut holes as a side during brunch? That did it right? Yeah we thought so.
properties.name: Brass Tap (Baltimore)

properties.blurb: It’s a magical feeling to drink a cold beer while looking up at the mountains. Whether you’re in town for a ski trip or just want a place to drink great beer, Breckenridge Brewery is a must. Their rotating beer menu includes seasonal options and longstanding favorites like the Avalanche Amber Ale. Food options include burgers, wings, and other satisfying pub specialties.
properties.name: Breckenridge Brewery

properties.address: 1020 E Lincoln Ave, Fort Collins, CO 80524, USA
properties.name: Breckenridge Brewery (Fort Collins)

properties.blurb: Think of Breckenridge Brewery’s Littleton location as grown-up summer camp. You know, the kind of camp where you can take a brewery tour, and then play bags, and then catch some live music while you drink a Juice Drop Hazy IPA. The grounds are massive, so bring your besties and plan to make a day of it. And don’t be surprised if you end up singing camp songs around the fire pit by the end.
properties.name: Breckenridge Brewery (Littleton)

properties.blurb: Oh Breckenridge Taphouse, where do we begin? Is it with your buffalo tacos or your smoked elk sausage? Do we point to the generous selection of beers on tap or the ultra cozy vibes of your outdoor patio? OK, you get it: we’re fans. We could say more, but why not stop in for a drink and see for yourself.
properties.name: Breckenridge Taphouse

properties.blurb: Located in a gorgeously renovated space, Bremer Brewing Company opened in the fall of 2021 and has been attracting local fans ever since. And no wonder! Their beers are some of the best around, and they bring in a rotating cast of food trucks to satisfy your other cravings. Order a flight that includes the C33 Creamery and the Harvester to see what all the fuss is about.
properties.name: Bremer Brewing Co

properties.address: 5856 Grand Oro Ln, Unit 104, Wesley Chapel, FL 33544
properties.blurb: Brew Bar offers a totally unique beer drinking experience. Their self pour model is genius for our loyal PubPassers, those of you who like to try a little bit of everything. At Brew Bar, you pay buy the ounce so you can sample ALL the beers. Or you can just pour one of your favorites and let your friends have all the fun. With a changing lineup of local craft beers, wine, seltzers, and cocktails, you are guaranteed to find something that pleases your palate.
properties.name: Brew Bar (Wesley Chapel)

properties.blurb: You’ve ridden The Brew Bus for work functions and parties (if you haven’t, you must). Now it’s time to get to know their beers! From the Blueberry Wheat to the Hazelnut Spread Porter, there’s a wide variety for bus riders and terminal sitters alike. While you ride, dream of the menu that will greet you upon your return. They had us at hand-battered cheese curds and pork belly banh mi.
properties.name: Brew Bus Brewing

properties.blurb: Brew Hub has a lot of plans when it comes to helping craft brewers expand their distribution. Thankfully for the rest of us, they also have a lot of beers on tap at their brewery and tasting room. Stop by this Lakeland-area brewery for a drinking menu including Cherry Lime Guava Seltzer, fruit beers, an Orange & Vanilla Stronger Lager, and a Key Lime Pie Berliner.
properties.name: Brew Hub

properties.blurb: We came on a Sunday for brunch and stayed through dinner (Psst! Try the Duck Confit Reuben.). Brew Hub Taproom features a 4-barrel system, distilling operation, and a barrel-aging program, which lets them get all sorts of funky with their batches. We’re suckers for their Fruit Beers and Sours—but we’re especially fond of their Hard Seltzers. Want something more traditional? Fiiiiiiiine. Diver Down, their Imperial Red Ale, will more than tickle your fancy.
properties.name: Brew Hub Taproom

properties.blurb: An accountant, an industrial real estate broker, an IT entrepreneur, and a college professor walked into a bar… and decided to open a brewery together. That last part isn’t just a bad punchline: Brew Lab is now a thriving brewery, taproom, and American/Tex-Mex kitchen, along with being Kansas City’s only YouBrew (where you can become brewmaster for a day). After all, they call themselves “a craft beer lover’s theme park” for a reason.
properties.name: Brew Lab Brewery & Taproom

properties.blurb: BrewDog Denver is an absolute gem, especially for those taco lovers out there. Their menu boasts everything from stacked burgers and sharable plates to salads and a kids menu. The standout? Their legendary tacos, featuring Mondragón family recipes like Cochinita Pibil and Birria. With plenty of vegan and vegetarian options, there's something for everyone. Plus, with 30 taps pouring BrewDog's best and Colorado's finest, it's a beer lover's paradise.
properties.name: BrewDog Denver

properties.address: 120 N Main St Suite L40, Hartford, WI 53027
properties.blurb: By the pricking of our thumbs, something tasty this way comes. If you find yourself titillated by all things eccentric, funky, and peculiar and want to toast to those delights, this is your new go-to haunt. With an excellent selection of sippables, and some shareables, not to mention a deep love of the local community, it is clear that not all omens are bad.
properties.name: Brewed Omen

properties.address: 3107 Gillham Rd Suite 100, Kansas City, MO 64109
properties.blurb: Hungry for an adventure? Brewer's Kitchen is all about local love with everything 100% made from scratch! Start with their house-ground beef burgers, smothered in sauces so fresh, they even make their own ketchup and mustard. Pair it with one of their Local Forward Beers, brewed right here in Kansas City. These craft beers are all about celebrating local brews and perfectly complement the made-with-passion menu. Whether you're chilling indoors or taking in the fresh air outside, Brewer's Kitchen promises an experience that'll keep you coming back for more!
properties.name: Brewer's Kitchen

properties.address: 9228 Park Meadows Dr, Lone Tree, CO 80124
properties.blurb: Time to spice things up at Brewery Bar III—a fiesta for your taste buds awaits! Picture yourself diving into a bowl of delectable Chili Con Queso, paired perfectly with an ice-cold beer. But wait, there's more! Their menu is a Mexican food lover's dream, with tempting delights like bean dip smothered in cheese, mouthwatering quesadillas, and if you're feeling adventurous, go for the Create Your Own Mexican Pizza. It's a flavor explosion you won't want to miss! Of course, since you're here for the beer, Brewery Bar III doesn't disappoint. Their craft beer selection rotates regularly, promising a new taste adventure with each visit. It's a beer lover's paradise, and you'll find yourself coming back for more, just to try all the unique brews they have on tap.
properties.name: Brewery Bar III

properties.blurb: Brewery Emperial is part bar, part restaurant, part garlic parmesan fries delivery system. And apparently when a brewery does food just as well as they do beer, the next logical step is putting something called Biscuit on tap. Is it a liquid? A solid? Only one thing’s for sure, it belongs in your belly immediately, if not sooner. Vibe next to the open wood-fired oven, stretch out in the spacious beer garden, and come see the reason they put brewery in the name first.
properties.name: Brewery Emperial

properties.blurb: Brewery Rickoli doesn’t need fancy equipment or a big operation to brew up some of the best beer in Denver.They brew on a tiny 3BBL system, using a cooler that's held together with PVC and duct tape. But don’t let that fool you. What they lack in size, they make up for in flavor. They pride themselves on brewing big, high-gravity, well-balanced brews that keep all 16 of their taps filled. One thing that sets Brewery Rickoli apart is their gluten-removed beers that actually taste like beer. They want everyone to be able to enjoy a cold one, and their brews truly deliver. For those who prefer something lighter, their M.E.H Cream Ale is a refreshing option with a kiss of hops. And for those who like their beer with a little more complexity, the Quicher Bichen is a German-hopped brew with fruity notes. So if you're looking for big flavors in a small space, head on over to Brewery Rickoli.
properties.name: Brewery Rickoli

properties.address: Corner of Loyola and Girod, 734 Loyola Ave, New Orleans, LA 70113
properties.blurb: This isn't your ordinary brewery experience - it's an extraordinary journey of flavors and fun. Step inside and be captivated by the sleek and stylish ambiance that sets the stage for an unforgettable time. Whether you're planning a date night, getting pumped for a night out, or simply seeking the best of New Orleans' culinary scene, Brewery Saint X has got you covered. Indulge in their excellent menu offerings that perfectly complement their wide array of tantalizing beers. Get ready to elevate your taste buds to saintly heights at Brewery Saint X!
properties.name: Brewery Saint X

properties.address: N58W39800 Industrial Rd suite d, Oconomowoc, WI 53066
properties.blurb: Brewfinify may be a little tricky to track down, but that’s part of the fun. Step inside and you’ll discover Oconomowoc’s original on-site brewery, pouring 16 freshly brewed craft beers that cover the full spectrum of styles. Pair your pint with some laid-back snacks, settle into the relaxed taproom, and enjoy the kind of atmosphere that makes time slow down. After all, the best spots are always a little hidden.
properties.name: Brewfinity Brewing Co

properties.address: 1848 Kings Cir S, Neptune Beach, FL 32266
properties.blurb: Dog-friendly bars and brewpubs are nothing new, but believe us when we tell you, dearest canine- and beer-loving friends, that this place is on a whole other level. Pups get to go HAM in “The Yard,” a super spacious off-leash area filled with dog-friendly turf, “splash pad” water features, ample shade and plenty of treats. There’s even trained ”Ruffarees” on site to deescalate any extracurricular activity between intermingling mutts. Owners are invited to sip on ever-rotating taps of excellent local craft beers and wine on “The Porch,” a covered concession-style bar. What a ter-ruff-ic concept! We also love that Brewhound is female created, owned-and-operated.
properties.name: Brewhound Dog Park + Bar

properties.blurb: You will instantly feel like you're part of a community where the love for craft brews unites. "You brewlong here" isn't just a catchy motto, it's a promise. From an extensive tap list that seems to go on forever to the regular visits from awesome food trucks, Brewlando is more than a place to grab a drink. It's where unforgettable memories are brewed. This isn't just a one-time visit; it's a place that calls you back, time and time again. So, if you're looking for more than just a pub, if you're searching for that perfect blend of flavors and friendship, then Brewlando is your ultimate destination.
properties.name: Brewlando Brewing

properties.blurb: Rocking a 1950’s supper club vibe on the outside, inside Brewski’s is a classic sports bar free of all pretension, right in the heart of Packer Country. Cold drafts? Summer Shandy by the firepit? Absolutely. With ample space for big groups, multiple big screens, and a lively atmosphere, Brewski’s is the ultimate spot to catch all your favorite sports. Whether you're a die-hard fan or just in it for the good times, Brewski’s Sports Club is the place to be. Come for the game, stay for the unforgettable experience!
properties.name: Brewski's Sports Club

properties.blurb: When you come to Briar Common, you best come hungry. And plenty thirsty. Their Sour Seoul, a Sour Chili Ale, is one of the most interesting beers we’ve ever had in the history of forever. It was complemented nicely by Briar Common's creative gastropub food, all of which is oh-so-Instagrammable. #omnomnomnom
properties.name: Briar Common

properties.blurb: When you come to Briar Common, you best come hungry. And plenty thirsty. Their Sour Seoul, a Sour Chili Ale, is one of the most interesting beers we’ve ever had. It was complimented nicely by Briar Commons creative gastropub food, all of which is oh so Instagrammable.
properties.name: Briar Common Brewery + Eatery

properties.blurb: They say, “To eat is to enjoy, “ and by golly we’d be hard pressed to disagree. Pay close attention now - Brisket. Made from SCRATCH. Thin crust Chicago pizza. Queso Mac and Cheese Dog. Boursin stuffed mushroom caps…We’ve gotten carried away, so sorry. You’ll find your classic domestic drafts/cans available here but if you want that extra razzle dazzle in your day, do yourself a favor and order one of their cocktails. The Gold Glove is our favorite but you can never go wrong with a 7th Inning Stretch.
properties.name: Brick & Ivy Rooftop

properties.blurb: Come for the 20 beers on tap. Stay for the largest big-screen TV in the Cedar Rapids area. Brick Alley & Sports Bar has stadium seating for Hawkeye fans, as well as indoor and outdoor patio seating overlooking the art in the alley for the less sporty types. This dedication to sports, though, shouldn’t be surprising to anyone who knows the bar’s owner: after all, he coached youth sports in Marion for over 15 years.
properties.name: Brick Alley & Sports Bar

properties.blurb: There’s not a bad seat in the house if you’re looking to take in the game, and that extends beyond just the bar as flatscreens hang like chandeliers. Even the comfy couch-like seating encourages you to stay for a couple hours. A wide range of gastropub standards will help soak up any one of their creative cocktail concoctions, like the Peanut Butter Old Fashioned or the Strawberry Coconut Margarita. Or opt to stay and root for your squad with any of their 7 or so draft options.
properties.name: Brick House Tavern + Tap

properties.blurb: Brick River Cider knows their roots and their fruits. They craft deliciously crisp ciders using only locally sourced Midwestern fruit. Passionate about regional agriculture and local history, they’ve set up shop in a historic fire station, with a gastropub on the second level. In addition to their flagship ciders, they offer seasonal varieties, so there’s always something new to tempt your tastebuds.
properties.name: Brick River Cider Co

properties.address: 1701 McGee St #200, Kansas City, MO 64108, USA
properties.blurb: Located at 17th and McGee in Crossroads District, just steps away from everything important! Tour our ciderworks or hang out and watch the game. Savor the number one craft cider in Missouri in the old automobile district of KC.
properties.name: Brick River Cider Co

properties.blurb: With an impressive lineup of 63 beers on tap, this cozy establishment offers something to satisfy every beer lover's craving. Known as Mississippi's Craft Beer Headquarters, Brickhaus Brewtique takes pride in offering a diverse selection of statewide microbrewery delights. From bold Double IPAs that pack a punch to crisp and refreshing craft beer specialties, customers can explore a wide range of flavors. But the adventure doesn't stop there! The tap wall is a treasure trove of regional and national breweries, pouring out regular favorites and exciting seasonal varieties that are sure to tickle every palate. And the best part? Brickhaus Brewtique has the food to match their brews! The menu is packed with all the goodness one would expect from a top-notch beer spot, ensuring the perfect accompaniment to any chosen brew.
properties.name: Brickhaus Brewtique

properties.blurb: We aren’t very good at keeping secrets, especially when it has to do with awesome sports bars so we are letting the cat out of the bag when it comes to Brickhouse Sports Bar. The drinks are incredible and the vibes are just right. With darts and pool tables there is always something to do. Huge TV’s and live music create an atmosphere you can hang out in for hours. And the staff? So wonderful, inviting, and friendly. They will make you feel right at home as soon as you walk in the door.
properties.name: Brickhouse Sports Bar

properties.blurb: Steps away from the vibrant Vieux Carré, there's a haven for wonderfully strange brews that'll blow your taste buds away! Welcome to Brieux Carre Brewing Co, where the magic of New Orleans comes alive in every sip. In this part of town, we know that strange is a synonym for amazing! With a dash of creativity and a whole lot of passion, Brieux Carre is the perfect spot for beer enthusiasts looking for a unique adventure.
properties.name: Brieux Carré Brewing Co

properties.address: 50 W Park Ave, Long Beach, NY 11561, USA
properties.name: Bright Eye Beer Co

properties.blurb: Looking for a fun and lively spot to grab a cold one? Look no further than Brightside Aleworks in Altoona! This taproom is a must-visit for any beer lover in the area. With a rotating selection of delicious and unique brews, you'll always find something new to try. And the friendly and knowledgeable staff will make you feel right at home. Whether you're looking for a hoppy IPA or a smooth porter, Brightside Aleworks has you covered. So come on down and join us for a pint of their famous beer - we promise you won't regret it!
properties.name: Brightside Aleworks

properties.address: 1604 S Cascade Ave, Colorado Springs, CO 80905
properties.blurb: Located in a historic former elementary school, Bristol Brewing Co. offers all manner of scholarly pursuits. Like shuffleboard. And a seasonal beer garden. And, of course, an annual Prohibition-themed Party with 33 cent Pilsners. Plus, on Tuesdays from 6 to 8pm, they donate a dollar from every pint to a featured local nonprofit of the week.
properties.name: Bristol Brewing Co

properties.address: 119 S 2nd St, Mt Horeb, WI 53572, USA
properties.blurb: Want farm-fresh food and cider without selling your house, moving to the country, and waking up at dawn to milk something? Brix Cider has you covered. Their small-batch ciders are made with locally grown apples, and the scratch kitchen menu changes with the seasons and it is always spotlighting what’s freshest from nearby farms. It’s farm-to-table without the farm chores.
properties.name: Brix Cider

properties.address: 736 S Broadway St, St. Louis, MO 63102
properties.blurb: Look, we can’t explain how this spot in downtown St. Louis manages to capture everything that is magical about New Orleans. Spend a couple hours inside with a po-boy or jambalaya or blue crab cakes and you’ll stumble outside expecting to be transported to Bourbon Street. The atmosphere is lively, the bartenders have perfected the your favorite cajun cocktails, and you never know when live blues music is going start up. Laissez les bon temps rouler, St. Louis!
properties.name: Broadway Oyster Bar

properties.blurb: The par for this course is never having your game canceled due to weather, a top tier bar selection, and finding your new favorite hangout. It’s the perfect location for an anytime hangout with your friends or a business meeting set up for tee time. You can test your swing on greens from around the world while you sip on your favorite craft beer or cocktail and not worry about who’s turn it is to be caddy.
properties.name: Broheim's Indoor Golf & Pub

properties.blurb: We’re pretty sure Milwaukee is one of the most underrated baseball towns in America. You’ll get no argument from the folks at Broken Bat. These guys nerd out hard over two of our favorite things: baseball and beer. Even the names are a perfect homage to ball. We clocked Straight Chedd Apricot Pale north of a sneaky smooth 7%. And on a hot summer day you’ll be hard pressed to beat their Farmhouse or Pilsner on the patio.
properties.name: Broken Bat Brewing

properties.blurb: During our formative years, we had big dreams of making it to The Show. But our puberty-related growth spurt didn’t hit until the ripe old age of 28, which pretty much permanently shelved our major-league aspirations. Lucky for us, Broken Bat has an indoor wiffleball field where we can do our best Gorman Thomas impression at the plate after knocking back a Czech Pilsner or two.
properties.name: Broken Bat Brewing

properties.blurb: A community-driven co-op in Northeast where the shareholders have a significant voice explains all the good vibes this place emits, along with trivia and gameday events for good measure. It also might have something to do with Unstable Unicorn and Forbidden Hugs—two tasty beers on the tap list that were likely named after tipping a few. Just a hunch.
properties.name: Broken Clock Brewing Cooperative

properties.blurb: A brew-tiful spot where family-owned charm meets fantastic brews! The Broken Hatchet is that and more.
