And don't even get us started on the Honey Chipotle Corn Ribs—seriously, you don't want to miss these bad boys. We may have filled up on appetizers (oops!), but the mains are just as tempting. And if you're feeling extra brave, take on the Heat & Repeat Food Challenge—worthy bragging rights await those who dare.
properties.name: Crafty Cow - Burgers & Fried Chicken

properties.address: 153 E Wisconsin Ave, Oconomowoc, WI 53066, USA
properties.blurb: Get ready to be wowed at Crafty Cow, where the beer and food game is strong! The beer menu is a playground for your taste buds, featuring unique and exciting brews that will leave you wanting more. Of course, we had to dive into their signature Crafty Cow Lager, and it was so darn good, it vanished before our food even hit the table. But let's talk about the food—oh boy, it's a flavor explosion! From the Maple Bacon Brussels Sprouts to the Chicken Fried Pork Belly with cheese sauce and chili crisp, each bite is a taste sensation. And don't even get us started on the Honey Chipotle Corn Ribs—seriously, you don't want to miss these bad boys. We may have filled up on appetizers (oops!), but the mains are just as tempting. And if you're feeling extra brave, take on the Heat & Repeat Food Challenge—worthy bragging rights await those who dare.
properties.name: Crafty Cow - Burgers & Fried Chicken

properties.address: 6519 W North Ave, Wauwatosa, WI 53213, USA
properties.blurb: Get ready to be wowed at Crafty Cow, where the beer and food game is strong! The beer menu is a playground for your taste buds, featuring unique and exciting brews that will leave you wanting more. Of course, we had to dive into their signature Crafty Cow Lager, and it was so darn good, it vanished before our food even hit the table. But let's talk about the food—oh boy, it's a flavor explosion! From the Maple Bacon Brussels Sprouts to the Chicken Fried Pork Belly with cheese sauce and chili crisp, each bite is a taste sensation. And don't even get us started on the Honey Chipotle Corn Ribs—seriously, you don't want to miss these bad boys. We may have filled up on appetizers (oops!), but the mains are just as tempting. And if you're feeling extra brave, take on the Heat & Repeat Food Challenge—worthy bragging rights await those who dare.
properties.name: Crafty Cow - Burgers & Fried Chicken

properties.blurb: Crane Brewery Company’s tap room is somehow both rustic and modern, with a 26-ft live-edge bar, reclaimed barn-wood tables, and hand-painted menu boards. But the real draw, of course, is the ever-evolving myriad of beer on tap. Also available: soda, local kombucha, and nitro cold-brew coffee from Benetti’s!
properties.name: Crane Brewing

properties.address: 630 Creek Centre Dr Suite A, Baton Rouge, LA 70820
properties.blurb: Come for the self-pour beer wall. Stay for a mac n brisket bowl, jumbo hot dog, or monster pretzel. Or for the slew of family-friendly activities, from corn hole to Connect Four to axe throwing. And if all of that doesn’t convince you, this renowned Baton Rouge barbeque spot also has cocktails on tap, as well as beers like the HiFi HeFe Wheat Beer. Say that five times fast.
properties.name: Crave Hot Dogs & BBQ (Baton Rouge)

properties.blurb: Come for the self-pour beer wall. Stay for a mac n brisket bowl, jumbo hot dog, or monster pretzel. Or for the slew of family-friendly activities, from corn hole to Connect Four to axe throwing. And if all of that doesn’t convince you, this renowned Shreveport barbeque spot also has cocktails on tap, as well as beers like the Double Cherry Limeade Goose.
properties.name: Crave Hot Dogs & BBQ (Shreveport)

properties.blurb: This is the microbrewery of our dreams where the beer flows like liquid gold and the vibes are always top-notch! Prepare yourself for a taste adventure like no other as you indulge in a treasure trove of exceptional brews on tap. These brew wizards are passionate about their craft, and their head brewer is a bona fide beer maestro! From your all-time favorites to jaw-dropping seasonal and special concoctions, they've got it all covered. Get ready to have your taste buds do the happy dance!
properties.name: Crawford Brew Works

properties.blurb: Wanna cross off “coolest brewery located on a farm” from our PubPass bingo card? Crazy Dingo is a bit off the beaten path, but well worth the drive. This family-friendly spot is a fave for locals who visit the farmers market and stick around for a beer or two. It’s all about balance, friends. Farm fresh vegetables with a beer chaser. It’s a thing. Okay, maybe it’s not a thing, but it should be.
properties.name: Crazy Dingo Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Crazy Gnome Brewery, the brainchild of founder Grayson, emerged from a serendipitous encounter with the world of brewing at the tender age of 20. Fuelled by a fervent passion for craft beer, Grayson embarked on a wild and wondrous journey that spanned a decade, immersing himself in the art of brewing. Now, Crazy Gnome Brewery stands proudly as a testament to Grayson's unyielding dedication and love for exceptional beer. With a heart full of excitement, the brewery is ready to unleash its long-cherished brews upon the world.
properties.name: Crazy Gnome Brewery

properties.blurb: Crazy Mountain Brewery is a little wild in all the right ways. Their motto? “Stench of Fresh" and oh man, does it smell good! From bold IPAs to rich stouts and crisp lagers, the taps are always rotating with new, creative brews that keep beer lovers on their toes. But it’s not just about what’s in your glass. With cozy vibes, great food, and a steady stream of live entertainment, Crazy Mountain delivers the kind of laid-back energy you’ll want to come back to again and again. Pull up a seat, grab a pint, and see what’s brewing next.
properties.name: Crazy Mountain Brewery

properties.blurb: Not only is Crazy Mountain known for brewing crazy-good beer, but they’re also one of few breweries we know to offer almost anything on their tap list for a mere $3 during happy hour. We recommend their Creedence Pilsner. It’s vibrant and easy-drinking, which is good. Because you’ll probably polish off a few at a cool three bucks a barley pop.
properties.name: Crazy Mountain Brewing Company

properties.address: 3121 N Garfield Ave, Loveland, CO 80538, USA
properties.blurb: Here resilience and flavor collide in the most refreshing way! Picture this: a crooked beech tree, standing tall and proud, providing shade and inspiration to the brewing process. Just like that mighty tree, Crooked Beech Brewing has weathered life's setbacks and continued to grow, infusing every pint with determination and tenacity. It's a place that leaves you in awe, where each sip tells a story of triumph and unwavering spirit. From the first taste, you'll believe in the magic that comes from never giving up. Let your taste buds experience the remarkable flavors that can only come from a journey rooted in resilience. Trust us, resilience tastes amazing.
properties.name: Crooked Beech Brewing Company

properties.address: 426 W Plant St, Winter Garden, FL 34787, USA
properties.blurb: Shop 'til you drop... right into Crooked Can Brewing Co! Nestled inside the bustling Plant Street Market, this spot is your perfect shopping pit stop. Grab a High Stepper American IPA or a Cloud Chaser Hefeweizen, then dive into their rotating selection of small-batch and seasonal brews. With something new and exciting always on tap, it’s like a treasure hunt, but with beer. Who could ask for more?
properties.name: Crooked Can Brewing Co

properties.address: 8251 Telegraph Rd Suite D, Odenton, MD 21113, USA
properties.blurb: Crooked Crab Brewing Co. doesn’t mess around. They brew the beer they love, and they do it right. From smooth cream ales to bold stouts, every pour is crafted with intention and packed with flavor. Their two taprooms boast 36 rotating taps, so the lineup is always fresh, always changing, and always worth the trip. No frills and no shortcuts. Just great beer made by people who care deeply about it.
properties.name: Crooked Crab Brewing Co

properties.address: 501 Washington Ave S, Minneapolis, MN 55415, USA
properties.blurb: ** DEAL NOT VALID ON VIKINGS GAME DAYS **
properties.name: Crooked Pint Ale House

properties.blurb: Crooked Pint Ale House is a neighborhood pub with big-city flavor. From Pub Pot Pies and Pub Tacos to Jumbo Tator Tots (yes, really), the menu keeps you coming back bite after bite. The beer list is just as impressive, with 32 drafts featuring local and regional craft favorites, plus plenty of wine, bourbon, and scotch for those feeling fancy. Classic comfort food, a legendary beer lineup, and a cozy spot to pull up a chair because Crooked Pint has all the ingredients for a perfect hangout.
properties.name: Crooked Pint Ale House

properties.blurb: Welcome to a crossroads of choices, where your thirst for adventure meets your quest for great taste! Now, before you consider parting with your soul or joining a retro road trip with Britney Spears (2002 vibes, anyone?), how about opting for something more refreshing—like a delightful beer? Yep, we were secretly hoping you'd choose that too (but if you bump into Britney, send our regards). At Crossroads Brewery, the magic happens as they craft their brews using only the finest ingredients. What's their specialty, you ask? Regularly releasing a captivating array of new beers, they’re all about variety and experimentation. It's a journey into taste that's constantly evolving, a testament to our commitment to keeping things fresh, exciting, and oh-so-delicious.
properties.name: CrossRoads Brewery

properties.blurb: Sharply designed interior of exposed brick and hardwoods set the tone for a night of finely-crafted brews at Crow Hop. Their Rado’s Red Ale with notes of dark caramel proved to be a perfect starter for our evening, but we wound up on the clear other end of the scale with a Sleeping Owl Stout, a beer so densely delicious we almost asked for a spoon. Crow Hop is intimately sized, features bingo and board games to heighten the fun, and rocks a cool patio to take in the fresh air. So hop on by and stay a while, won't you?
properties.name: Crow Hop Brewing

properties.address: 1165 E McNeese St, Lake Charles, LA 70607
properties.blurb: What began as a passion project has grown into a full-fledged destination. Join the locals flocking to Crying Eagle Brewing, where you can try their most popular beers: Louisiana Lager and Ready to Mingle. The brewery has a great outdoor space with games and a stage for live events. Making it a one-stop shop for your day is their bistro, which serves pizzas, sandwiches, and apps.
properties.name: Crying Eagle Brewing Co

properties.blurb: When we say Crystal Springs Brewing Company is homey, we mean it’s like hanging out at that cool neighbor's house who turned their garage into the ultimate brewpub. With beers like the Juicy Yo IPA, packed with tropical hops, and their ever-changing seasonal brews, you’re in for a treat. The cozy interior is perfect for a laid-back visit, but if it’s packed, you and your pup can chill on the dog-friendly patio. With ten-ounce and fun-sized four-ounce pours, there’s no reason not to sample a few and find your new favorite!
properties.name: Crystal Springs Brewing Co

properties.address: 657 S Taylor Ave Unit E Louisville, CO 80027
properties.blurb: Crystal Springs is a small taproom brewing up big things. With beer this good, something tells us you’ll find yourself drinking your way to the bottom of their tap list in no time. Particular favorites on our end are Hudson—their rock-solid Mid Coast IPA or their Wild Pumpkin Ale. The latter of which will have you saying, “Oh. My. Gourd.”
properties.name: Crystal Springs Brewing CO.

properties.blurb: With its grand opening scheduled just as the pandemic was hitting, Cultured Collective instantly struck a chord with the Orange Park community, and not only survived that setback, it has thrived and established itself as one of the best breweries in the greater Jacksonville metro. This is our kinda joint — an unpretentious taproom and brewing facility run by friendly artisans that features an experimental, beer-forward program specializing in fruited sours, New England IPAs and barrel aged stouts. With an ever-changing tap list rolling 20 deep, there’s something for everyone (even the not-so-hardcore and adventurous). If you enjoy having you socks knocked off, don’t miss the She’s My Cherry Pie Smoothie Sour or Fenrir Imperial Stout. Bonus creativity points for boasting one of the best art-directed Instagram feeds we’ve ever seen.
properties.name: Cultured Collective Brewing

properties.address: 2719 Loker Ave W STE D, Carlsbad, CA 92010, USA
properties.name: Culver Beer Co

properties.blurb: Whether you’re a local or just passing through Bailey, make sure you stop by Cutthroat Cafe for breakfast. And lunch. Actually, you should probably just plan on eating a meal here daily for however long you’re sticking around. The chicken fried steak is some of the best you’ll ever taste. And nothing says hearty like a two-hander burger. So what if we just made up “two-hander” - you know what we mean. It’s obviously a burger so big that both hands are required.
properties.name: Cutthroat Cafe

properties.blurb: If beer drinking is our favorite pastime, then people-watching ranks a pretty close second. Lucky for you, Cycle Brewing offers a masterclass in both. Enjoy one of their top notch stouts out on the patio and soak up all the eclectic neighborhood vibes. The beers are crafted with intention and creativity, and the stouts in particular are complex and rich. If stouts aren’t your thing, have no fear - they offer some equally solid IPAs and lagers.
properties.name: Cycle Brewing

properties.address: 1109 Honey Ct, De Pere, WI 54115, USA
properties.blurb: Nestled right near the Fox River Trail in De Pere, WI, you'll find a fantastic little gem called Cycling Brews. Committed to some of the best local craft beer around, they also "cycle" through rotators from the Midwest and beyond. Whether you're looking for that hazy from your favorite GB haunt or wine or seltzer is more your forte. Cycling has you covered. Be on the lookout for food truck schedules and live music weekly via their website. We indulged in some suds and some of the best bar snacks in town as we dipped through on a bike ride along the Fox. A must-stop in De Pere!
properties.name: Cycling Brews

properties.blurb: This is one of those local breweries that happens to be on everyone’s ‘must stop’ list in Baton Rouge. From the laid back atmosphere to the friendly, knowledgeable bartenders, Cypress Coast Brewing is doing it all right. In addition to their top notch in house beers, they offer a few guest taps from some of your faves. We absolutely love how you never know what you’re going to get when you walk in - they’re slinging new brews all the dang time.
properties.name: Cypress Coast Brewing Co

properties.blurb: At Czann's Brewing Co., they take pride in sourcing high-quality ingredients for their craft beers. They partner with Franco-Belges, one of the largest malteries in Europe, to provide the base and specialty malts for their brews. One sip of their Czann's Blonde, and you'll understand why it's a crowd favorite. This light and refreshing beer is bursting with flavor, delivering a satisfying experience without ever feeling watered down. For those seeking a darker brew, their Czann's Dunkelweizen is a must-try. With a blend of caramel and Munich malts from Germany, France, and Belgium, this dark wheat beer offers a rich and complex taste that will captivate your palate. Whether you're a fan of lighter or darker beers, Czann's Brewing Co. has something to satisfy every beer lover's cravings. Cheers to quality craftsmanship and unforgettable flavors!
properties.name: Czann's Brewing Co

properties.blurb: On the off chance you don’t know that Czech Station should be your destination for all things tasty and delicious, we are here to change that ASAP. You want Benedicts? You’ll be sorry if you don’t try the I’m Not Crabby or the Southern Sow. Loaded Biscuits and Gravy? They’ve got you covered. Wanting a more savory choice? We could cry because their Adult Grilled Cheese is so good. Feeling especially razzle-dazzle? Edible shot glasses. Rest assured, you will not leave disappointed.
properties.name: Czech Town Station

properties.blurb: Dacha Beer Garden is one big party. A killer outdoor space coupled with a carefully curated menu of German, Belgian, and American craft beers, local meads and ciders, draft cocktails, and an array of wines. Use your PubPass for a house draft to get things rolling, then check out their menu! Bring the dog, bring the fam damily—good times are to be had here.
properties.name: Dacha Beer Garden

properties.blurb: If you’re a fan of Dacha Beer Garden, you’re bound to love Dacha Navy Yard. Modern American comfort fare meets a bustling bar and lounge with an outstanding craft cocktail and wine menu, plus plenty of craft beer (use your PubPass for a house draft!), cider, and mead for all your drinking needs. Their monster pretzel with stout beer cheese and helles lager mustard is so delish it’s ridic.
properties.name: Dacha Navy Yard

properties.blurb: Get ready to indulge in the ultimate beer experience at Danico Brewing Co. This spot’s a hidden gem with a cozy vibe and a seriously impressive lineup of handcrafted brews. From their crisp and clean Hey Pard’ Pils to rotating IPAs, stouts, and sours, there’s something here for every kind of beer lover. Add in a solid food truck schedule and you’ve got all the makings of a perfect afternoon.
properties.name: Danico Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Taking a hard lean towards the pubs and taverns of Ireland, Danny's is every bit a 180 degree turn from the bars that seem to have drifted towards the feel of a family fun center. Make no mistake, Danny's is a pub, with darts, and cool bartenders, and live DJ dance nights. They cater as well to the Joe Public sports fan by tossing the game du jour up on the flatscreen. However, it's the little touches like darker than dark wood interior, a heavily-represented Irish draft list, and "newspaper" liners for their baskets of food that earned from us the silent "tip o' the cap" respect.
properties.name: Danny's Pub

properties.address: 4955 S Ulster St Ste 103, Denver, CO 80237
properties.blurb: With touches of an Irish Pub, Darcy’s has been at it since ‘02. Not far from Cherry Creek State Park. So while there has to be the mainstays of Guinness and Harp, you’ll also be able to pair that fish ‘n chips with a bevy of Colorado options, like the Copper Ale from Colorado Pub Company or the Apricot Blonde from Dry Dock. Outdoor seating, karaoke, live music, and the occasional trivia night mix things up. We got a cold stare when showing off our Riverdance moves, but we probably deserved it.
properties.name: Darcy's Bistro & Pub

properties.blurb: MKE is full of neighborhood gems you might not stumble upon unless your buddy checked it out first. Lucky for you? PubPass is your buddy and we checked out Dark Horse one night for several hours. The place is a legit, no-frills, authentic Milwaukee watering hole complete with regulars, laughter, good times, and the possibility you will be the one who tells your friends about this rad little spot you found.
properties.name: Dark Horse

properties.address: 103 W Birch Ave, Flagstaff, AZ 86001, USA
properties.name: Dark Sky Brewing

properties.blurb: We’ve known for a while that crafting a perfect drink is an artform. Now you can enjoy art while in the presence of actual art, because friends, drinking beer and cocktails is now considered CULTURE. Your friends will be impressed by your suggestion to hit up DarkHorse and they’ll think you’re incredibly intelligent and worldly and have a big vocabulary. Don’t worry, we won’t tell them that you secretly just want to drink beer and look at cool stuff.
properties.name: DarkHorse Art Bar

properties.blurb: Looking for a dart bar that hits the bullseye in all categories? Look no further than this gem in the Riverside area! Dart Bar and games has a focus on craft beer and bar games. The spacious layout is packed with classic bar games like darts, pool, air hockey, and foosball. But wait, there's more! Prepare to be amazed by unique additions like bumper pool and bubble hockey. And let's talk beer—10 rotating craft taps featuring the best of Florida and North Florida, while the other 10 taps cover the bar usuals. Combine all that with excellent service and a vibrant atmosphere, and you've got a winning combination at this dart bar. Get ready for a memorable night of fun, games, and brews!
properties.name: Dart Bar & Games

properties.blurb: It’s impossible not to love a place called Day Drink Inn. It’s basically training camp for folks who aspire to beer drinking greatness. This neighborhood bar has the friendliest bartenders, an incredibly warm and inviting atmosphere, and obviously wants to support local day drinkers. There are plenty of great beers on tap, some incredible classic cocktails, and reasonable prices. Yeah, you heard us. Great drinks and great people and great prices. When does training camp begin?
properties.name: Day Drink Inn

properties.address: 3178 Bladensburg Rd NE Suite B, Washington, DC 20018
properties.blurb: Just a friendly public service announcement: don’t come here if you’re not ready to make friends. The bartenders are laid-back and know their stuff, and before you know it, fellow beer enthusiasts might be striking up a conversation about their favorite IPA or crisp lager. Don’t worry, it’s all part of the vibe. Everyone’s just excited to share the love for good beer, and honestly, you’ll probably agree once you try a pint or two.
properties.name: DC Brau

properties.address: 1726 Dr. William Finlayson St, Milwaukee, WI 53212, USA
properties.blurb: At Dead Bird Brewing, the motto 'Outstanding Beer by Upstanding Gentlemen' isn't just a tagline. It's a way of life. Since 2015, they've been crafting high ABV beers that are as unique as they are delicious, often highlighting locally sourced vegan ingredients. And the food? Let's talk about the Sexy Chips. Crispy potato chips tossed in truffle oil, parmesan, parsley, and red pepper flakes. Pair those with an array of pizzas that perfectly complement their brews, and you've got a recipe for a fantastic time.
properties.name: Dead Bird Brewing Co

properties.address: 3701 S Santa Fe Dr STE 7, Sheridan, CO 80110
properties.blurb: Motto here is big flavorful beers, brewed in small manageable batches. Certainly accounting for the flavor was the Shawnee Pale with a nice citrus pang and the Debbie Harry Blonde which had us in …. Rapture. A fun hippie decor with tie-dye and pinball machines, they’re cool with bringing in outside food to go with your brew. Even order some delivery if you’re grumbling. Great beer gives us those mellow vibes, man.
properties.name: Dead Hippie Brewing

properties.blurb: We have to give it to Dead Lizard Brewing: they know how to commit to a bit. This family-owned and operated craft brewery has everything from Key Lime Chameleon Cream-Sic-Ale to Gila Monster Chocolate Coffee Stout on their tap list. Plus, their food menu includes dishes like Grampy Lizard’s Flatbreads, Frozen Iguana Ice Cream Bar, and Fire Salamander Pretzel Sticks.  Luckily, no dead lizards made the menu.
properties.name: Dead Lizard Brewing

properties.address: 14258 W Club Deluxe Rd, Hammond, LA 70403, USA
properties.blurb: Deadbeat Brewing Co is our go-to hangout when we need a little time in nature… or just an excuse to drink beer outside. Grab a spot in the sprawling beer garden, soak up the waterfront views, and maybe challenge your friends to a game under the oaks. The brews hit all the right notes. Classic, creative, and totally worth lingering over. Basically, it’s the kind of place where leaving is optional.
properties.name: Deadbeat Brewing Co

properties.address: 23 N Orange Blossom Trail, Orlando, FL 32805
properties.blurb: Deadwords Brewing Co is a masterful curator of handcrafted beers, drawing inspiration from the pioneers and innovators of the American craft beer movement. Their portfolio boasts a diverse selection of brews, thoughtfully crafted to delight both seasoned craft beer enthusiasts and newcomers to the world of beer. Guided by a passion for sharing their craft, Deadwords Brewing Co takes pride in their well-trained staff who expertly navigate customers through their tantalizing tasting list. With a warm and welcoming approach, they ensure that every visitor discovers the perfect beer match for their taste.
properties.name: Deadwords Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Get ready for a top-notch craft beer selection and the coziest lounge in town. Seriously, we thought about moving in! Indulge in some arcade games and savor their unique and delicious dishes while you're here. And don't forget to catch their fantastic live performances on the weekends! You're in for an unforgettable time, so raise your glass to great beer and good vibes at Dees Brothers Brewing! Cheers!
properties.name: Dees Brothers Brewery

properties.blurb: Do you know what an extravaganza is? No need to consult Merriam-Webster. Because this, in a sense, is it: Friday Fish Fry, Saturday Prime Rib Special, and a beer garden full of carefully crafted microbrews. Maybe it’s a rendezvous instead? No more questions. Yes, more beer. You can't go wrong with a Dockside — their perfectly drinkable Kölsch — or a Mango Sunset Lager when it's in season. Prost!
properties.name: Delafield Brewhaus

properties.blurb: Nestled right on Main Street, Della Viti is where you can kick back and let the experts lead you to your new favorite sip. Whether you’re into wines, beers, or cocktails, they’ve got you covered. The vibe? Totally laid-back and cozy, perfect for unwinding. Pair your drink with some small plates packed with big flavors, and you’ve got yourself a winning combo. With a draft beer selection, wines, and cocktails, there’s something for every palate.
properties.name: Della Viti

properties.address: 154 S Main St, Laurie, MO 65037, USA
properties.name: Demolition Brewing Company

properties.address: 4550 Van Buren St, Riverdale Park, MD 20737
properties.blurb: The folks at Denizens Brewing are doing their part to create a craft beer for everyone to enjoy. For real, if you don’t find something on their tap list, then you’re not trying hard enough. We know you’ve got it in you, gang! The Born Bohemian Pils and Animal Hazy IPA are two stellar beers to start with. With some yummy nibbles on the menu as well, grab your pals and enjoy some brews on the outdoor patio.
properties.name: Denizens Brewing Co

properties.blurb: The folks at Denizens Brewing are doing their part to create a craft beer for everyone to enjoy. For real, if you don’t find something on their tap list, then you’re not trying hard enough. We know you’ve got it in you, gang! The Born Bohemian Pils and Animal Hazy IPA are two stellar beers to start with. With some yummy nibbles on the menu as well, grab your pals and enjoy some brews on the outdoor patio.
properties.name: Denizens Brewing Co.

properties.address: 5500 Main St, New Port Richey, FL 34652
properties.blurb: As Plato once said, it isn’t about how pristine the keg looks — it’s about how good the beer tastes. Okay, he probably didn’t, but he should have. This local brewery tucked in Historic Downtown New Port Richey offers seasonal beers like the Dentoberfest Dented Keg, as well as food trucks, Wednesday night trivia, and Thursday night Bingo.
properties.name: Dented Keg Ale Works

properties.address: Des Moines Water Works Park, 2251 George Flagg Pkwy, Des Moines, IA 50321, USA
properties.blurb: Willkommen to the Des Moines Biergarten! Don’t worry, that’s just fancy talk for "welcome" in German. But hang out here long enough, and you’ll be speaking fluent Deutsch too! Something about those steins of beer and the authentic German vibes has a way of making you feel like a local, even if your only previous German experience was saying "bratwurst."
properties.name: Des Moines Biergarten

properties.blurb: Descarga Brewing, or DBC as the cool kids call it, is always down for a good time. Their beers are inspired by flavors from South America, Central America, and the Caribbean. So now you can skip that cruise vacation and relax with a Hoocihe Mama or Slo Mo here instead. Sorry boss, no one wanted to see you in a swimsuit anyway.
properties.name: Descarga Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Gilbert is really stepping up the craft brew game and we’re happy to report that Desert Monks does not disappoint. At this everyman’s brewery, you’ll find a wide selection of house brews and the monks promise there’s something for everyone. With a rotating tap that includes seasonals, you never know what you’re going to find, but if Golden Juicy Layers IPA or Quit Your Wine-ing are on the tap list when you pop in, get one. Heck, settle in and get both.
properties.name: Desert Monks Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Destination Grille is definitely as advertised. It is the cool new IT spot and they’re bringing the upscale yet casual dining experience to the folks of Grimes. The space is huge. The food is delicious. The drinks are cold. Unless you order an after dinner coffee, then it’s hot, like it’s supposed to be. You’ll find a little something on the menu for everyone (the chicken wings come highly recommended). The cocktail and beer menus are just as unique as the dining experience itself.
properties.name: Destination Grille

properties.blurb: Prepare to go a little wild at Deviant Wolfe Brewing! They're all about balancing tradition with a dash of daring. From classic styles to fearless experiments, their brews are like works of art. With fresh ingredients, they whip up a draft menu that dances with the seasons, bringing you unique flavors you won't find just anywhere. And guess what? When you're ready to munch, they've got your back with everything from by the slice pizzas to strombolis and crisp salads. Your night out just found a new twist – and a pint of pure pleasure!
properties.name: Deviant Wolfe Brewing

properties.blurb: Dewey Beer in Denver's RiNo Arts District is our go-to spot for catching up with friends. Whether we're inside soaking in the brewery vibes or outside enjoying the fresh air, it's the perfect place to kick back. With 18 beers on tap, there's always something new to try and everyone can find their favorite brew. It's one of our favorite places to hang out, sip some amazing beers, and just enjoy good times together. If you haven't been yet, what are you waiting for? We'll see you there!
properties.name: Dewey Beer

properties.blurb: The draft list is top notch. That’s why you came here. Or so you thought. Then you worked your way through a menu that features curds with some dynamite homemade ranch, a legendary pretzel with multiple mustard sidecars, and Hummus made with local beer and served with deep fried pita (and just enough veggies to make you feel great about yourself). Wait. Those are just a few of the appetizers. There’s sandwiches and burgers and pizza, too? And a fish fry people say is the best in town?! Yeah. We’re gonna be back here often.
properties.name: Dexters

properties.blurb: Delve into the world of innovation and flavor at Diamondback Brewing, an extraordinary production brewery that thrives on pushing boundaries and crafting unforgettable experiences. Their commitment to their craft shines through in their unfiltered lagers, bold hop-forward ales, and artfully brewed mixed-fermentation beers. This dedication to excellence extends beyond just the brews. Prepare to be wowed by their Neapolitan-inspired pizzas, each a mouthwatering masterpiece in its own right. Nestled in a cozy nook, Diamondback Brewing may be a hidden gem, but once you stumble upon it, it becomes an unforgettable part of your journey. The moment you take a bite of their mind-blowing pizza, you'll realize you've found a treasure trove of taste.
properties.name: Diamondback Brewing Co

properties.blurb: When you think of France, you don’t often think of beer. Berets, sure. Disdain for American tourists, yep. Champagne, absolutely. Beer? Not so much. But Diebolt has a whole host of French-inspired craft beer ready to make you say, “Ooh là là!.” They don’t just stick to French styles, though. Our latest must-drink is their Session Stout. (Extra points because of its name: Vlad-i-da-di, We Likes to Party!)
properties.name: Diebolt Brewing

properties.blurb: This place is more than just a clever name—it's a haven of disco music, dance parties, karaoke, and even drag queen bingo. Everyone is invited to join the fun and revel in the magic of craft beer crafted with love by the talented Disco Witch brew crew. Sip on something unique and offbeat, like the Studio 54 Blueberry New England IPA, and let the rhythm move you on the dance floor. When you need a breather, cool down with an Easy Lover Kölsch. And don't forget to refuel with mouthwatering Nathan's Famous hot dogs. Plus, mark your calendar for the special champagne and charcuterie celebration on Sundays. Disco Witch is where the fun never stops, so come on in and let the disco fever take over!
properties.name: Disco Witch Brewing

properties.address: 5518 Haines Rd N, St. Petersburg, FL 33714
properties.blurb: Step into the world of Dissent Craft Brewing, where being obsessed with brewing outstanding ales is practically in their DNA. They firmly believe that creating truly exceptional ales demands more than just a casual commitment to premium ingredients. It's that irresistible blend of art and science in their brewing process that has them utterly absorbed. From the very inception of the grains to the moment that liquid perfection touches your lips, it's a journey of unyielding fixation. It's not just about making beer; it's about their unrelenting obsession to redefine your beer experience.
properties.name: Dissent Craft Brewing

properties.blurb: The lineup at Dissent Craft Brewing is just insane. They take their passion for craft brewing to the next level. Their can art is gnarly. Their Lakeland taproom is comfy and inviting. We haven’t even gotten to the beer yet. The classic Dissent IPA is a fave. Living the Dreamsicle, a berliner with blood orange and vanilla, brings back memories of running around outside in summer in bare feet with sticky popsicle melting and dripping down your fingers. Head to Dissent, live your dream!
properties.name: Dissent Craft Brewing (Lakeland)

properties.address: 835 Serenoa Rd, Santa Rosa Beach, FL 32459
properties.blurb: What’s finer than a cocktail made with award-winning spirits that have been lovingly hand-crafted using all local ingredients? How about everything we just said, but the family-run distillery making said spirits is also legit committed to serving its community and practicing sustainable, eco-friendly production methods—so you can feel even better when sipping your tipple of choice! Both vodkas—Half Shell and Dune Laker—are to die for. Try them in a martini or your favorite beach bevvy (the distillery is located mere minutes from glorious Grayton and Rosemary beaches on the Gulf Coast). The dog-friendly tasting room lounge is hip as heck, with mid-century modern vibes, while an outdoor patio boasts plasma TVs for all the games. Live music is always a possibility, while a rotation of food trucks ensures you’ll never go hungry.
properties.name: Distillery 98

properties.blurb: Take the plunge into the vibrant atmosphere of Dive Inn, a dive bar that's all about fun and good times. Get ready to be whisked away by their Tiki-themed cocktails, craft beer selection, and their signature classic Old Fashioneds that will make your taste buds dance. As the self-proclaimed Official Unofficial Badger Women's Volleyball Bar, Dive Inn is the ultimate spot to catch a game and cheer on your favorite team. And if you're a die-hard Packer fan, you're in luck! They have special game day deals just for you, along with the occasional meat raffle to satisfy your carnivorous cravings.
properties.name: Dive Inn

properties.blurb: Divided Vine emerged as a unifying concept, inviting everyone to share their love for beer and wine in a warm and welcoming environment. The founders, Jeff, Emily, and Clayton, pour their heart and soul into this bar, creating a space where people can gather and enjoy their favorite libations. This delightful establishment offers a diverse menu that caters to all tastes, featuring scrumptious pizza, delectable paninis, and a mouthwatering Churro Stack for a delightful dessert, accompanied by a luscious Nutella dipping sauce. From the moment you step inside Divided Vine, you'll feel the passion and camaraderie that underpins this vibrant place.
properties.name: Divided Vine Beer and Wine Bar

properties.blurb: DJ's Watering Hole is the place where soulful and healthy meals come alive with bold flavors. Every dish is crafted with love and expertise using house recipes that are sure to tantalize your taste buds. From savory delights to nutritious options, their menu is a culinary journey you won't want to miss. And when it comes to quenching your thirst, DJ's Watering Hole has got you covered with an impressive selection of local and domestic draft beers. Whether you're a beer connoisseur or simply looking to enjoy a refreshing brew, their tap lineup will surely satisfy. Get ready to indulge in a soulful meal and raise a glass to good times at DJ's Watering Hole. Cheers to flavorful bites and a wide selection of brews that will keep you coming back for more.
properties.name: DJ's Watering Hole

properties.address: 117 Martin Luther King Jr Blvd, Madison, WI 53703
properties.blurb: You had us at "Burger and Shake of the Month." I mean, who wouldn't want to dive into an imaginatively delicious shake and burger combo that changes every four weeks? It's like a delightful surprise for your taste buds, and we're totally on board. But that's not all – DLUX is also rocking some seriously amazing craft beers on tap, and they proudly feature the best brews from local Wisconsin breweries. So, if you're all about supporting local while sipping on some seriously good suds, you're in for a treat.
properties.name: DLUX

properties.address: 117 Martin Luther King Jr Blvd Madison, WI 53703
properties.blurb: We started with a beer and some chili cheese fries. Then we had another round and some mac & cheese fritters before pairing a third pint with an absurd grilled cheese we built (and devoured) ourselves. The next morning we came back for brunch and had the bacon, double egg and cheesy. Then we went home and took a nap in a beer-filled waterbed covered in cheese. Okay, that was just a dream, but it was delicious and we blame the food Wizards at DLUX.
properties.name: DLUX

properties.blurb: If you’ve lucked out with your prescription, you’ll head to Doc’s Lounge where it’s always good for what ales ya. Maybe you’ll right your ship with a Exile Dankalope IPA or peer into the fridge to gawk at that Peach Tree Blonde Fatale or that deep ‘n dark CocO Stout from West O. Trivia, live music, and karaoke keeps it lively and the friendly, down-home regulars and bartenders will make sure you get back up in the saddle.
properties.name: Doc's Lounge

properties.address: 2780 W Chandler Blvd Ste 8, Chandler, AZ 85224, USA
properties.name: Dog Haus (Chandler)

properties.address: 1 E Washington St #120, Phoenix, AZ 85004, USA
properties.blurb: You probably came here thinking the hot dogs are the main event, and we’d agree! You’re right! With creations like the Chili The Kid, loaded up with chili, crispy onions, and aioli. These aren't your average ballpark hotdogs. But let’s not forget about the burgers here, too. The Holy Aioli burger? Stacked with American cheese, smoked bacon, caramelized onions, and a garlic aioli so good, it might just steal the spotlight. Pair either with a local craft brew, and you’ve got yourself a winning combo.
properties.name: Dog Haus Biergarten

properties.blurb: You probably came here thinking the hot dogs are the main event, and we’d agree! You’re right! With creations like the Chili The Kid, loaded up with chili, crispy onions, and aioli. These aren't your average ballpark hotdogs. But let’s not forget about the burgers here, too. The Holy Aioli burger? Stacked with American cheese, smoked bacon, caramelized onions, and a garlic aioli so good, it might just steal the spotlight. Pair either with a local craft brew, and you’ve got yourself a winning combo.
properties.name: Dog Haus Biergarten (Bethesda)

properties.address: 1837 M St NW, Washington, DC 20036, USA
properties.blurb: So, you thought the burgers and hot dogs were the stars? Well, hold on because Dog Haus has so much more. Their crispy wings, tenders, and chicken sandwiches deserve their own fan club. And breakfast burritos? Oh yeah, packed with caramelized onions, drizzled in aioli, and (the real kicker) tater tots inside the burrito. Pair that with one of their local brews, and you’re looking at a new go-to order.
properties.name: Dog Haus Biergarten (Dupont)

properties.blurb: We just found out you can order any sausage at Dog Haus and get it dipped in root beer batter. We know you come here for beer recs, but this feels important. Yes, there’s a killer lineup of local craft beers. Yes, there are greasy, delicious onion rings that you’re gonna fight your friends over for the last one. Yes, you can watch sportsball on the TVs. But also. A brat. Dipped in root beer batter. You’re welcome.
properties.name: Dog Haus Biergarten (Gaithersburg)

properties.address: 2224 E Williams Field Rd #107, Gilbert, AZ 85295, USA
properties.blurb: So, you thought the burgers and hot dogs were the stars? Well, hold on because Dog Haus has so much more. Their crispy wings, tenders, and chicken sandwiches deserve their own fan club. And breakfast burritos? Oh yeah, packed with caramelized onions, drizzled in aioli, and (the real kicker) tater tots inside the burrito. Pair that with one of their local brews, and you’re looking at a new go-to order.
properties.name: Dog Haus Biergarten (Gilbert)

properties.address: 933 Ellsworth Drive, Suite 933, Silver Spring MD 20910
properties.blurb: We just found out you can order any sausage at Dog Haus and get it dipped in root beer batter. We know you come here for beer recs, but this feels important. Yes, there’s a killer lineup of local craft beers. Yes, there are greasy, delicious onion rings that you’re gonna fight your friends over for the last one. Yes, you can watch sportsball on the TVs. But also. A brat. Dipped in root beer batter. You’re welcome.
properties.name: Dog Haus Biergarten (Silver Spring)

properties.blurb: Spanish conquistador Ponce de León arrived in Saint Augustine over 500 years ago in search of the mythical fountain of youth. You’ve no doubt arrived here in search of a fountain of delicious craft beer, which the good people of Dog Rose Brewing Co. have kept flowing on-site for several years running. The Lincolnville Lagers go down dangerously easy on a fine day, of which there are many in these parts. Fancy something darker? Might we suggest The Roadside IPA and Rhapsody in Red. We’re also big fans of this spacious, spartan taproom, with local art adorning its deep blue walls, darts and shuffle board tables awaiting action, and a great live music stage that hosts some serious talent on weekends.
properties.name: Dog Rose Brewing Co

properties.address: 1347 Keystone Way Suite A, Vista, CA 92081, USA
properties.name: Dogleg Brewing Company

properties.blurb: Everyone knows that folks are friendly in Door County. It should come as no surprise to you that the good people at Door County Brewing Co. are some of the nicest in the biz up in Bailey’s Harbor. They go out of their way to make you feel like family, even if you’re just in town for one weekend each summer. The patio is the place to be if you’re in the business of making friends (humans and pups alike). So go ahead, lean into patio season, enjoy a flight of refreshing, inspired brews, and yeah, tear into that BBQ Nacho Box.
properties.name: Door County Brewing Co

properties.address: 1241 Linda Vista Dr, San Marcos, CA 92078, USA
properties.name: Dos Desperados Brewery

properties.blurb: Dos Santos brings the vibrant flavors of the Yucatán to Colorado, delighting taste buds with every bite. Start your culinary adventure with a salsa flight, offering a tempting selection of four signature salsas that will make your taste buds dance with joy. But the real star of the show is their mouthwatering taco menu. With so many enticing variations to choose from, you'll find yourself happily exploring the delightful world of tacos. And if you're feeling adventurous, be sure to return monthly to savor the Taco of the Month, a delightful surprise that never disappoints.
properties.name: Dos Santos

properties.blurb: Beer just hits different when it’s created by friends that have full tilt leaned into the wild and joyful experience that comes from brewing. Although you’ll find the typical brew types on their tap list, there is nothing typical about these beers. While sipping on their hazy IPA, Unearthly Glow, the magic of this beer will cast your taste buds into a flavor dream of a brisk cloudy day. It’s like the mornings in Fall when the air has just the right nip in it so you wanna snuggle up in your favorite sweater…but in a beer. Listen, it sounds crazy we know, but you’ll just have to trust us and go try it.
properties.name: Double Shift Brewing Co

properties.blurb: From arcade games to escape rooms, you can slip into an array of different realities and then quench your reality…reality thirst with their impressive display of beers on tap. Honestly they have 60 beers on tap so you can quench your thirst in whatever reality you want to. And there’s an amazing food menu to pair right along with those beverages. Personally we’d suggest the Chopped Cheese, but then again we wouldn't say no to anything on this menu.
properties.name: Double Tap KC

properties.blurb: Certainly a place called Dough Co. better put out a good pie. Hand-tossing New York style thin crust pizzas, Dough Co. also boasts some of the sneaky best sandwiches in Des Moines. With always-rotating tap selections from local favorites, they’re showing just as much care with what they pour. Ain’t it great to have some New York pizza without all that jackhammer noise? Now please, give us some space, We’re eatin’ here! We’re eatin’ here!
properties.name: Dough Co Pizza

properties.address: 300 Progress Dr Suite E, Cottage Grove, WI 53527
properties.blurb: Bold flavors. Unexpected combos. Cocktails that don’t play by the rules. This place is shaking things up (pun absolutely intended) with house-made spirits like cucumber, elderflower, and hibiscus. All of which are of course crafted and served right from the source. Doundrins Distilling isn’t just pouring drinks; they’re rewriting the cocktail menu, one delicious experiment at a time.
properties.name: Doundrins Distilling

properties.blurb: Downhill Brewing is serving up some of the Denver metro’s finest brews, times two with tasting rooms in both Parker and Greenwood Village. Each location is serving its own unique tap list so if you don’t see that one beer you’ve been dreaming about… well, you might just be at the wrong tasting room. But our best suggestion is trying both. Pair your pint with a thin crust pizza (because beer and pizza will always be a perfect combo) and settle in for a laid-back, flavor-packed hang.
properties.name: Downhill Brewing

properties.address: 9672 E Arapahoe Rd, Greenwood Village, CO 80112, USA
properties.name: Downhill Brewing (Greenwood Village)

properties.address: 6770 S Dawson Cir ste 400, Englewood, CO 80112, USA
properties.name: Downslope Distilling

properties.blurb: Downtown House of Pizza is a treasure disguised as a casual neighborhood spot. But it’s hard to fly under the radar for long with a tap list of the best Florida craft beers and pizza chefs who toss dough into the air like it’s nothin’. And serving that cheesy, New York–style pizza until 2 AM on Saturdays? Fuhgeddaboudit.
properties.name: Downtown House of Pizza

properties.address: 401 Baronne St Suite 101, New Orleans, LA 70112
properties.name: Dream House Lounge

properties.address: 115 NW 6th St, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33311, USA
properties.blurb: Why wake up? Keep those dreams alive, my friend, because at Dream State Brewing, they're serving up liquid fantasies that'll leave your taste buds dancing in delight. You’ll have to pinch yourself because you'll wonder if you're in a dream with beers this good. From their delightful American lager to their mesmerizing Double IPA, they've got a lineup that can send you into a flavor trance.
properties.name: Dream State Brewing

properties.address: 3701 S Iowa Ave, St Francis, WI 53235
properties.blurb: Timeless drinks. Good company. That’s what Dreamers offers. Translation? This is a tavern lover’s tavern. A bar lover’s bar. A place where the game will be on, the beer will be cold and the laughter will be constant. So start with a bloody, chase it with a pint and, before too long? You’ll be dreaming of moving to St. Francis. Or at least finding a crash pad for the night.
properties.name: Dreamers

properties.address: 3701 S Iowa Ave, St Francis, WI 53235
properties.blurb: Timeless drinks. Good company. That’s what Dreamers offers. Translation? This is a tavern lover’s tavern. A bar lover’s bar. A place where the game will be on, the beer will be cold and the laughter will be constant. So start with a bloody, chase it with a pint and, before too long? You’ll be dreaming of moving to St. Francis. Or at least finding a crash pad for the night.
properties.name: Dreamers Classic Bar

properties.blurb: The old DW Pub was one of our favorite watering holes anywhere. Full stop. The new iteration takes that love to a whole new level. Same righteous old fashioneds. Same celebration of all things Wisco. New ridiculously great location in the Deer District and even more swag to take home. So grab a beer, peruse the cocktail list and scope a fresh shirt or two to enhance your closet cred.
properties.name: Drink Wisconsinably Pub

properties.blurb: Dry Dock Brewing's tale begins with a nautical nod - the return of a tall ship to its birth in the dry dock. It was a time of creation, a labor of love that set the stage for their hand-crafted beer adventure. Fast forward to today, and Dry Dock Brewing is sailing strong, crafting brews that are as bold as they are delicious. Picture this: a lineup of flavors that'll make your taste buds dance a jig! Get ready to set sail with their "home fleet" of brews, where each one is a treasure waiting to be discovered. From the sun-kissed Apricot Blonde to the zesty Citrus Wheat, the smooth Breakwater Pale Ale to the tangy Blood Orange Blonde - it's a flavor expedition that promises excitement with every sip. But wait, there's more on the horizon! Dry Dock Brewing loves to keep things fresh and fun with their ever-changing seasonal concoctions. It's like a carnival for your taste buds, a parade of flavors that keeps you coming back for more.
properties.name: Dry Dock Brewing

properties.blurb: Dry Dock Brewing's tale begins with a nautical nod - the return of a tall ship to its birth in the dry dock. It was a time of creation, a labor of love that set the stage for their hand-crafted beer adventure. Fast forward to today, and Dry Dock Brewing is sailing strong, crafting brews that are as bold as they are delicious. Picture this: a lineup of flavors that'll make your taste buds dance a jig! Get ready to set sail with their "home fleet" of brews, where each one is a treasure waiting to be discovered. From the sun-kissed Apricot Blonde to the zesty Citrus Wheat, the smooth Breakwater Pale Ale to the tangy Blood Orange Blonde - it's a flavor expedition that promises excitement with every sip. But wait, there's more on the horizon! Dry Dock Brewing loves to keep things fresh and fun with their ever-changing seasonal concoctions. It's like a carnival for your taste buds, a parade of flavors that keeps you coming back for more.
properties.name: Dry Dock Brewing (North Dock)

properties.blurb: Owner and operator Kerry Drake has ancestral European roots and tries to tap into that DNA by putting out some of the finest German, Belgian, and American beers. We started with the lovely Head Zeppelin Hazy IPA and then moved to the formidable Captain Scrumdiddly, an Oatmeal Raisin Amber that was a cookie meets beer delicacy that cemented a place in our long term memory for years to come. Tack on to the good beers, occasional nights of bingo or stand-up comedy. Dratz has the care and attention to beer that only a true brewmaster could deliver.
properties.name: Drätz Brewing Co

properties.blurb: European tavern meets Minnesota nice meets over a dozen beers on tap meets charitable and community-focused events. If you need to meet a friend for a beer, or meet someone new who then could become a friend who you then meet for a beer—this brewhouse meets all the criteria.
properties.name: Dual Citizen Brewing Co

properties.address: 451 S Thompson Ave, Excelsior Springs, MO 64024
properties.blurb: The health benefits of mineral water in the early 1900s may have been a dubious claim — but the quality of the beer at Dubious Claims is not. This bar, named after the media expose of the mineral water business, presents beer as the cure for what “ales” you. And, listen, doctor: if you insist. Additional miracle cures: root beer on tap, Garlic Cheese Sticks, and regular Trivia and Bingo nights!
properties.name: Dubious Claims Brewing Co

properties.address: 451 S Thompson Ave, Excelsior Springs, MO 64024
properties.name: Dubious Claims Brewing Company

properties.blurb: History buffs need to visit this architectural marvel just to bask in its Romanesque majesty. Built in 1898, back when steamboats still dominated the mighty Mississippi, Iowa’s oldest brewery survived prohibition and numerous floods to produce untold quantities of beloved Dubuque Star beer over the ensuing century. Stone Cliff Winery took up residence in 2006 and recently has begun to produce excellent craft beer under the Dubuque Star name. Take a tour of the lovingly restored facility and immaculately manicured grounds whilst sipping a crisp Rhomberg Czech Style Pilsner or easy drinking Silver Star IPA. Or sample a wide variety of award-winning wines made from locally grown grapes, order up some succulent charcuterie and flatbreads, and laze the afternoon away in the stunning tasting room and wine garden. Did we mention there’s live music on weekends?
properties.name: Dubuque Star Brewery

properties.blurb: Deuces Wild Brewery is the epitome of good times, good company, and absolutely fantastic beer. When you step inside, you'll be greeted by a lively atmosphere and friendly faces, setting the stage for an unforgettable experience. Now, let's talk beer. The Banana Hammock Hefeweizen is a must-try, boasting a perfect blend of 50% wheat malt and 50% barley malt, creating a unique and delicious flavor. Fermented with care, it fills the air with a delightful banana aroma that will have you coming back for more. But the adventure doesn't stop there! Deuces Wild offers an impressive variety of beers that will excite your taste buds with every sip. From hoppy IPAs to smooth stouts and everything in between, their beer selection is a playground for craft beer enthusiasts.
properties.name: Dueces Wild Brewery

properties.address: 3352 Templeton Gap Rd, Colorado Springs, CO 80907
properties.blurb: Deuces Wild Brewery is the epitome of good times, good company, and absolutely fantastic beer. When you step inside, you'll be greeted by a lively atmosphere and friendly faces, setting the stage for an unforgettable experience. Now, let's talk beer. The Banana Hammock Hefeweizen is a must-try, boasting a perfect blend of 50% wheat malt and 50% barley malt, creating a unique and delicious flavor. Fermented with care, it fills the air with a delightful banana aroma that will have you coming back for more. But the adventure doesn't stop there! Deuces Wild offers an impressive variety of beers that will excite your taste buds with every sip. From hoppy IPAs to smooth stouts and everything in between, their beer selection is a playground for craft beer enthusiasts.
properties.name: Dueces Wild Brewery (T-Gap)

properties.blurb: When we learned that Dugout 54 would sponsor our sports team, we decided it was time to take up sports. Mostly so we could hang out here before and after games. Wait. We don't need to be athletic to occupy barstools for hours on end? Just need to come with a big thirst begging for 32 taps to cool it down before D-54's spectacular array of appetizers ramps it right back up? AND they'll drive us to and from Brewers games? Sold. Where do we sign? As part of this deal can we change our name to Waffchos?
properties.name: Dugout 54

properties.blurb: Good drinks, food, and service. We call it the trifecta, and you can find it at Duke’s. We dig the wide variety of drinks and the neighborhood bar vibes. Plus, there’s something about a place that does American Bar food right that we can’t help but love. Try the gumbo - if not because it’s delicious, then because, how often can you get gumbo at a local sports bar? If you’re looking for a local watering hole, get yourself a table at Duke’s.
properties.name: Duke's

properties.blurb: There are bars and then there are experiences. Dukes on Water is definitely the latter. Let it be known that this bar gets plenty lively, and it’s not hard to figure out why. Their famous $1 happy hour runs every day, and they’ve got lots of TVs to catch the game, so come ready to rub elbows with your fellow sports fans while drinking at a steep discount.
properties.name: Duke's on Water

properties.blurb: Like all solid Wisco bars, this one is gonna play the Packers and serve you up a drinkable Pilsner and a punchy Oktoberfest. Durand Brewing might be new to the scene, but they know what they’re doing. The folks here are already offering an impressive lineup with friendly bartenders that treat you like family. Come for the beer, stay for the stellar service and live music. It’s what a good Wisconsiner does.
properties.name: Durand Brewing Co

properties.address: 28212 N Tatum Blvd Suite D6, Cave Creek, AZ 85331
properties.blurb: A bona fide oasis of craft beer and gourmet bites in the dusty Sonoran Desert, this friendly neighborhood taproom and bottle shop boasts some of Arizona’s best brews among its 20 rotating drafts. On a typical scorching hot day, we like to quench our thirst with some Crispy Japanese Rice lagers from The Shop Beer Co., or perhaps a Bavarian Hefeweizen from Lake Pleasant Brewing Company. But there’s something for all tastes and seasons—take your pick from over 100 bottles that can be enjoyed in the taproom or for take away. Pair your fave bevvie with a some stellar stonebreads—The Jam happens to be our jam, featuring locally sourced fig jam and bacon topped with candied walnuts and balsamic glaze.
properties.name: Dynamite Beer Co

properties.address: 100 E Camelback Rd #160, Phoenix, AZ 85012, USA
properties.name: Dynamite Beer Company (Uptown)

properties.blurb: This is your ultimate destination for entertainment and good times. With two full bars boasting 22 taps and 10 TVs, you can catch the latest games while enjoying your favorite drink. Challenge your friends to a game of pool on one of their nine tables or show off your dart skills on the three dart boards. But it's not just about the games - East End Ale House also offers a delectable menu featuring mouthwatering burgers, flavorful wings, and tempting appetizers. With events like dart leagues, open mic nights, karaoke, and live music, there's always something exciting happening at East End Ale House. So gather your friends, grab a drink, and immerse yourself in the lively atmosphere of East End Ale House.
properties.name: East End Ale House

properties.address: 1201 W Main St, Blue Springs, MO 64015
properties.blurb: Come find the spot where the city meets the country — and where craft beer meets the perfect cocktail. East Forty Brewing is tucked on the outskirts of the busy and crowded core of the metro, and offers food, entertainment, cocktails, and a variety of craft beers, from Colonial Pumpkin Ale to Sunrise Saison to Apple Chai.
properties.name: East Forty Brewing

properties.address: 3508 S Lamar Blvd #300, Austin, TX 78704, USA
properties.blurb: Part bakery, part beer garden, and packed with Austin charm, Easy Tiger is all about fresh pretzels, cold local brews, and good times. Grab a hearty sandwich, snack on a shareable board, or just sip something crisp while enjoying the laid-back vibe. With plenty of space to gather and a menu that’s as tempting as the beer list, it’s a perfect spot to hang with friends or just treat yourself to a little carb-fueled happiness.
properties.name: Easy Tiger (South Lamar)

properties.address: 6406 N Interstate 35 Frontage Rd #1100, Austin, TX 78752, USA
properties.name: Easy Tiger (The Linc)

properties.blurb: This expertly retro-ized dive looks like the kind of bar your parents drank at back in the day—wood paneled walls, dark booths, cigarette machine. While it’s definitely a great place to crush a few Budweiser cans and shoot cheap whiskey, Easy Tiger also boasts a modern-day cocktail menu that’ll have your senses purring. The Long Thailand (a boozy Thai tea) and Sergio Leone (rye whisky, Amaro and cinnamon stick garnish) both get high marks, as does the eats we sampled. The house specialty is Pizza Rangoon (cream cheese crab topping with sweet and sour sauce on a woodfired crust), but don’t skip the yummy tacos, Tiger Tots and spicy ramen. Snag some craft beer cans from the grab-n-go fridge and check out some live indie rock or work up that liquid courage and let ‘er rip on karaoke night.
properties.name: Easy Tiger Bar

properties.address: 1401 Baronne St, New Orleans, LA 70113, USA
properties.blurb: Ecology Beer Creative and Taproom is where beer, people, and joy collide. Picture this: a lush patio, cozy corners, and tunes that hit just right. Whether you're into sports, board games, or just chasing the next great food pop-up, this is the spot to kick back. Beer here is made with love, and once it’s poured, it’s all yours. So grab a pint, find your groove, and let the good vibes flow.
properties.name: Ecology Beer Creative

properties.blurb: With 4,500 square feet of outdoor space, picnic tables that can hold up to 250 people and a huge selection of both draft and bottled beers we can only wish our home garden was as cool as Lowry Beer Garden. Not only all of that but they also have a grill with casual fare with locally-made gourmet brats and sausages, freshly baked pretzels and house ground burgers. Bring your whole family for a backyard party with friends you just haven’t met, yet.
properties.name: Edgewater Beer Garden

properties.address: 860 Oak Harbor Blvd, Slidell, LA 70458, USA
properties.name: Eight60 Wine Whiskey Bites

properties.address: 2911 El Cajon Blvd #2, San Diego, CA 92104, USA
properties.name: El Cid Brewing Company

properties.blurb: The good people at El Rancho Brewing serve up mountain grub and brews with stunning views. Look, when a bison burger or an elk chili dog is on the menu, you know we’re gonna try it. And we’re gonna pair that with an award-winning Valhalla or I-70 IPA. If you’re lucky enough to be swinging through Evergreen, you can enjoy your brew and burger on the patio. This spot has been a staple since 1948 and we know places like this only get better with age.
properties.name: El Rancho Brewing

properties.blurb: This brother duo took their knowledge of fine craft beer to the next level to create hard seltzers. We love to mix it up every once in a while and when we’re craving something light and refreshing in lieu of rich and hoppy, we’re leaning into the Cherry Lime or Mango seltzer. Props on the cocktail lineup that features your old favorites infused with hard seltzer—you know we tipped back a New Fashioned or two to pair with that jalapeno popper pinwheel.
properties.name: Elevated Seltzer

properties.blurb: This cozy little brewery is quickly becoming a favorite with the locals. The folks at Elizabeth Brewing have a solid lineup of staples, including a smooth IPA and a citrusy blonde ale. But we are really digging what they’re doing with their Tiny Tap - inventive, whimsical, limited brews that are perfect for beer enthusiasts who want to try something new before returning to their favorite standby. We all have one. But it’s nice to try something new once in a while, eh?
properties.name: Elizabeth Brewing Co

properties.blurb: There are a few things we’d like to tell you about our dad. He doesn’t have an indoor voice, he’s always got Deep Purple on heavy rotation, and he wets his whistle with The King of Beers. Enter Wade. When Mitch (Wade’s son) called his dad in 2019 to talk about opening a brewery, Wade listened and nodded his head in agreement. A couple of years later and this son-and-dad duo is brewing up some mighty fine beers together. Every dad should be more like Wade.
properties.name: Elm Creek Brewing

properties.address: 13600 Juneau Blvd, Elm Grove, WI 53122, USA
properties.blurb: The Elm Grove Beer Garden presented by Third Space Brewing, is a seasonal beer garden in the Elm Grove Village Park that operates from May-October. Enjoy craft beers from Third Space Brewing along with a selection of seltzers, canned cocktails/wine and non-alcoholic drinks in a casual park setting. The beer garden is steps from the park’s playground, covered pavilion, volleyball and basketball courts. The Beer Garden often features live music, food trucks and weekly trivia.
properties.name: Elm Grove Beer Garden

properties.address: 1620 Central Ave NE Ste 152 Dock #10, Minneapolis, MN 55413, USA
properties.blurb: The passion these folks have for crafting the best bitters, cocktails, coffee, and spirits is contagious. You'll fund us in their cocktail room. Join us and prepare to be blown away by their creative concoctions, meticulously crafted with botanical magic and a healthy dose of experimentation. If you're thirsty for knowledge, their cocktail classes, like Cocktail 101, will quench your curiosity and leave you with a newfound appreciation for mixology. And let's not forget about the tasty snacks that perfectly complement their excellent cocktails.
properties.name: Elusive - Botanical Bar by Dashfire

properties.blurb: Sometimes you just need to belly up in a downtown bar and consider making harmless mistakes. It’s a part of the human experience. At Elwood’s, you can experience gameday specials (Go Pack Go!) and happy hours that prime your wild side. This joint is part lounge, part dive, part living Charles Barkley museum (just ask them) and all good times. While you are there you'll likely find Rufio, the owner, on the patio playing bags.  Make sure you challenge him a round! * Please present your pass before ordering! *
properties.name: Elwood's Liquor & Tap

properties.address: 8655 Production Ave ste a, San Diego, CA 92121, USA
properties.name: Embolden Beer Co

properties.blurb: In the realm of craft beer, Endless Brews lives up to its name with an abundance of options that seem, well, endless. With 20 thoughtfully curated taps and an impressive array of over 100 bottles and cans, beer enthusiasts will find themselves in a hoppy paradise. Endless Brews takes pride in offering a diverse selection that stretches beyond the horizon. From celebrated award winners to rising stars of the indie brewing scene, every taste and preference can be catered to. Even the most adventurous beer aficionados will be delighted with their ever-changing assortment of experimental styles and exclusive releases.
properties.name: Endless Brews

properties.blurb: If you’re anything like us, you’ve always lamented the fact that your favorite brewery can’t fix your bike. Wait, what? Who does that? Endo does that. Bring your ten speed (or single speed or 21 speed) for a tune-up and they’ll wrench your wheels while you wet your whistle. They’ll kick your tires while you kick back with a Kölsch. They’ll refill your pint while—you know what, we’ll show ourselves out.
properties.name: Endo Brewing Company

properties.address: 1500 Beach Blvd #217, Jacksonville Beach, FL 32250, USA
properties.blurb: Right in the heart of Jacksonville Beach, Engine 15 Brewing Co. is where beach days meet great brews. With a 7-barrel brewhouse cranking out year-round favorites and a rotating cast of "one-off" and seasonal beers, there’s always a new adventure on tap. They’ve got 30 lines pouring mostly their own magic, plus a few guest stars from around the world. Pair your pint with something tasty from their pub menu, and you've got yourself a perfect hangout spot. So check out the menus, grab some friends, and come see what the fun’s all about!
properties.name: Engine 15 Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Enlightened's beers are approachable yet noteworthy. We started with the delightfully simple cream ale and then worked our way through the year-rounders before enjoying a seasonal Pale Wheat so perfectly sessionable it made us want to be better humans.
properties.name: Enlightened Brewing

properties.blurb: The words “experimental” and “beer” together bring us joy when it references Enlightened Brewing Co.. The Rough Draught Series are created from beer brewed on-site and then fermented with different yeast, or dry-hopped with different hops. Sometimes they even get a little wild and add different fruit, spices, or other creative additives! These are limited and only available in their taproom. Speaking of their taproom, with the big windows and plenty of natural light. We left here feeling VERY enlightened.
properties.name: Enlightened Brewing Co

properties.address: 3027 E Harmony Rd Suite #2, Fort Collins, CO 80528
properties.blurb: Listen, we’re not saying that the coolest breweries have the coolest beer names. But we’re not NOT saying that, either. Especially when it comes to Envy Brewing, which has a toasted coconut stout named Flying Hamster of Doom. Envy’s beer list is in constant rotation, with experimental collaborations and well-rounded favorites on tap. They also serve something called “naan-za” – which is exactly as delicious as it sounds.
properties.name: Envy Brewing

properties.address: 430 E Central Blvd, Orlando, FL 32801, USA
properties.blurb: If you're on the hunt for a place that masters the delightful dance between food and wine, look no further than Eola Wine Company. Trust us, it's the kind of spot where you can treat your taste buds to a symphony of flavors. Their food menu is a whirlwind of deliciousness, offering everything from cheeses and charcuterie that'll make you feel fancy, to flatbreads that'll have you reaching for another slice. Oh, and their brunch game? Totally on point with breakfast flatbreads, quiches, and avocado toast that might just start your day off with a little happy dance. So, when you're craving that perfect pairing, Eola Wine Company is the friend you need to call.
properties.name: Eola Wine Co

properties.blurb: You can find a can of Epic in almost every state in the country, but to really get the real deal a stop at their brewery in Denver is a must. Looks like a damn State Fair concert hall from the outside, while the interior is spacious, polished and oh so aromatic with brewing happening mere feet away from where you’re drinking. Epic backs up its name with a tap room sporting 25 drafts featuring flagships, rotating seasonals and special “one off” firkins – cask conditioned ales.
properties.name: Epic Brewing Company

properties.blurb: Lots of craft breweries start from humble hobbyist beginnings. Few of them go from there to multiple medals and serious expansion quickly thereafter. Welcome to Escape! Just a short drive north of Tampa sits a spot that should be on your radar (if it isn’t already). These guys are pouring beers you’ll remember. We started with a Five Flags Pils and a Poolside Chill (one of Escape’s noteworthy Berliners) before getting our hop on with a Got Your Stash (a beautifully dank IPA) and I’m Interesting at Parties — a DIPA with a name as fantastic as its multi-hop finish. Tell your friends about Escape. Better yet? Bring them next time!
properties.name: Escape Brewing Co

properties.address: 701 S Miami Ave, Unit 412A Brickell City Centre, Miami, FL 33131
properties.blurb: Not content to just brew Thailand’s top beer, the creators of Singha recently brought their know-how to Miami. Combining the tropical flavors of their homeland with local ingredients, the beers at EST 33 are crisp and refreshing. But they didn’t stop there. The menu boasts familiar Thai favorites with a twist—the Thai-spiced beef brisket is a standout.
properties.name: EST. 33 Thai Craft Brewery & Kitchen

properties.address: 470 Prospect Village Dr, Estes Park, CO 80517
properties.blurb: Look, we don’t claim to be outdoor experts. If anything, we subscribe to the “I’m outdoorsy in that I like day drinking on patios” lifestyle. But we are beer experts, so if you want our advice on how to refuel after a grueling day outdoorsing in the Rockies, here goes – waffle fries and cold beer. Hydration and fried foods are key. It’s science, or whatever. Lucky for you, both can be found in abundance at this charming brewery in the heart of Estes Park.
properties.name: Estes Park Brewery

properties.blurb: Is there a bigger selling point for a Colorado spot than “heated outdoor patio?” Nah, didn’t think so. At Evergreen, you can take your Hop Cracker IPA or Robot Dance pale ale outside to enjoy in any weather. Beer is not just for warm sunny days. Science says that it’s good for cold winter days, too. Science also suggests that beer pairs well with cheesesteaks, which, coincidentally, Evergreen excels at. Science is awesome.
properties.name: Evergreen Brewery

properties.blurb: Excelsior Brewing is all about good times by the lake. Brewing right on the shores of Lake Minnetonka, their taproom is as laid-back and welcoming as it gets, with live music, games, and plenty of space for the whole family—dogs included! You’re practically obligated to try the Big Island Blonde Ale, a refreshing nod to the lake’s vibrant history. Whether you’re coming off the water or just in need of a lakeside vibe, it’s the perfect place to relax with a pint in hand.
properties.name: Excelsior Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Alright, Des Moines, who gave you the right to be the new up-and-coming home to all our favorite breweries? The good people of Iowa deserve good beer that’s brewed, bottled, and served in their home state. Exile Brewing Co is leading the charge in the Midwest, creating a space for the community to gather and share in one of our nation’s greatest pastimes — drinking beer with buddies. We recommend an afternoon on the patio, sipping an ice cold Ruthie, noshing on cheese curds, and enjoying that fresh Iowa air.
properties.name: Exile Brewing Co

properties.blurb: Cruise out to Greendale and make a night of it at one of our favorite places to eat, drink and explore. You can’t go wrong with a Golden Ale and some wings. Or pair their delightful Imperial IPA with a Black Eye Burger. Ah, then there’s the Barleywine — a high gravity warmer worth drawing straws for who captains the land yacht home.
properties.name: Explorium Brew Pub Greendale

properties.address: 333 W Juneau Ave, Milwaukee, WI 53203, USA
properties.blurb: Explorium Distilled  keeps things fresh and fun with a spacious, industrial-chic taproom right in the heart of downtown’s Entertainment Block. With 24 lines of craft beer flowing, you’re guaranteed to find something new (or an old favorite) to cheers to. Dog-friendly and full of good vibes, it’s the perfect spot to unwind after the game at Fiserv Forum or just drop in for a taste of what’s brewing around town. Come for the beer, stay because you forgot to leave.
properties.name: Explorium Distilled

properties.address: 143 W St Paul Ave, Milwaukee, WI 53203
properties.blurb: In a beautiful, wide-open space, dive into an endless tap list of great beers, choose a glass from the wine selection, or sip on a house-made cocktail. Craving something tasty? Try the wings with 10 different sauces, or indulge in their delicious flatbreads, pizzas, and calzones. Whether you go traditional with fish and chips or baked cod you can't go wrong. If you're feeling adventurous might we suggest the Nashville Hot chicken, it’s a must-try. Is this the greatest menu ever assembled? You might just have to try it to find out!
properties.name: Explorium Third Ward

properties.blurb: Is it a brewery? Or is it a communal space for beer and brewers alike, a platform for the sud-like variety, a place where novice and expert brewers can showcase their concoctions — a beertopia if you will? If you’re wondering, it’s all of the above. And it’s why Factotum Brewhouse is one of our favorite joints in the beloved Napa Valley of Beer.
properties.name: Factotum Brewhouse

properties.blurb: Not only does Fait La Force focus on Belgian style beers they also focus on the motto of Belgium “L’Union Fait La Force” which paraphrase means “strength in unite” or “unity makes strength”. When we walked in we instantly felt like we belonged here. We couldn’t help but be impressed by the art and music showcased in the taproom from local artists. We could go on and on about how great this place makes us feel but we would be remiss if we didn’t tell you about the beers. While mostly Belgian style they also have a few IPAs on tap as well as a pils or two. Also don’t forget about the food. The Steak & Cheese pie in house or the whole menu from Il Forno next door.
properties.name: Fait La Force Brewing Co

properties.address: 3807 S Packard Ave, St Francis, WI 53235
properties.blurb: Weary travelers, this is your sanctuary. At Faklandia Brewing, every pint tells a story. Each mystical brew crafted to pull you deeper into their fantasy world. Pair your adventure with a scratch-made burger or sandwich, plus magical weekly food specials that keep things fresh and exciting. And don’t forget your furry sidekick! The dog-friendly patio is waiting to welcome you both to this one-of-a-kind storybook escape.
properties.name: Faklandia Brewing

properties.blurb: This Main Street tap room serves craft beer and signature cocktails with that unparalleled Midwest hospitality. Farmhand Brewing appears out of the Iowa cornfields like an oasis, serving locals and local-adjacents. Make this the joint you wander to when you’re back home visiting your folks and you and your cousins need a break. Rest assured, you’ll find cold beers and good company at Farmhand Brewing.
properties.name: Farmhand Brewing Co

properties.address: 7313 N Interstate 35 Frontage Rd NB, Austin, TX 78744, USA
properties.blurb: Big heart, even bigger vibes. Fast Friends blends bold, creative beers with a deep-rooted passion for bringing people together. Tucked into three and a half acres of lush green space just south of downtown, it’s part brewery, part retreat, and fully Austin. With thoughtful food, rotating taps, and plenty of room to roam, it’s a spot where good beer meets good energy — and every visit feels like something worth toasting.
properties.name: Fast Friends Beer Company
